CASTING CALL - VOLUNTEER
Hi all! We are casting for a short film, which is being created by a passionate crew of Capilano University alumni and students. 

This call is for the following 7 roles attached. 

It is volunteer and will be required for 1 day among the 4 dates listed below. If you already know that only a certain day will work among those, please let us know which. 

This film is art heavy, and some of the characters may be bearing quite a bit of make up.

If you are interested please email or DM me your headshots, mention which of the characters you are interested in (one or more), and if you have an acting reel, send that over aswell:

arjungillfilm@gmail.com

@arjungillfilm

P.S. If you are interested in the lead role, that call was posted in the group yesterday if you’d like to check it out.

items.text:
CALLING ALL YOUNG ACTORS, PARENTS, AGENTS & INDUSTRY FAMILIES!
THIS SUMMER... DON'T JUST TRAIN. LEAVE WITH THREE PROFESSIONAL SHOWREEL SCENES.
Perfect for young actors with or without representation, Spotlight members, drama students and anyone looking to break into the professional Film & TV industry.
Meladrama is proud to present three Screen Acting & Showreel Summer Schools, designed specifically for ambitious young actors who are serious about Film & TV.
WIGAN SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£140 if booked today | £160 in instalments
Tuesday 28th – Friday 31st July at Worsley Hall Community Centre, Wigan, WN5 9QE

PRESTON SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£175 if booked today | £200 in instalments
Monday 3rd – Friday 7th August at Lostock Hall Conservative Club, Brownedge Lane, Preston, PR5 5AA

WARRINGTON SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£175 if booked today | £200 in instalments
Monday 10th – Friday 14th August at St Wilfrid's Church Hall, Grappenhall, Warrington, WA4 3EP

Throughout the week, every actor will receive intensive professional coaching before filming THREE industry-standard showreel scenes in Native Accent, Received Pronunciation (RP) & General American. Every scene is professionally directed and filmed, giving actors fresh, high-quality footage to strengthen their Spotlight profile, impress agents and demonstrate their versatility to casting directors.
Unlike many showreel courses, our scenes are taken from real Film & TV scripts, carefully selected to suit each actor's age, casting type and ability.
Even better, every scene is performed opposite professional actors. Students will work directly with Melanie Ash and Leo Ashton, ensuring every performance is believable, natural and of the highest possible standard—no awkward scene partners, no uneven performances, just professional-quality footage you'll be proud to send to agents and casting directors.
Throughout the week students will receive specialist coaching in:
Screen Acting for Camera, Character Development, Audition Technique, Received Pronunciation (RP), General American Accent, Working with the Camera, Performance Direction, Industry Knowledge & Advice
Training is led by Melanie Ash—professional actor, director and acting coach, founder of Meladrama Acting Schooland CHAOS Actors Management. Melanie trained at the Manchester School of Acting and Manchester Metropolitan University, and her professional acting credits include Coronation Street, Emmerdale, Casualty, The Bay, Doctors, Ackley Bridge, Red Rose, Peterloo and numerous national television commercials. With over 30 years' professional experience, she has coached hundreds of young performers into successful careers in Film & TV, with students regularly securing roles for Netflix, BBC, ITV, Channel 4, Sky, HBO, Amazon Prime, and major feature films and TV Commercials. 
Students will also benefit from the experience of Leo Ashton, who began his professional acting career at just six years old. His credits include House of the Dragon, The Bay, Red Rose, Deep Water, Peterloo and more. As a young actor actively working within the industry, Leo offers invaluable first-hand insight into the realities and expectations of professional Film & TV acting.
Whether your child already has an agent, is building a Spotlight profile or is looking to break into the industry, this is an incredible opportunity to receive specialist training and leave with professional showreel material that can genuinely enhance future casting opportunities.
TRAIN. PERFORM. FILM. LEAVE INDUSTRY READY.
Can't attend every day?
No problem! We understand that many young actors have auditions, filming commitments and family holidays during the summer. Get in touch and we'll do our very best to create a bespoke package wherever possible, so your child doesn't miss out.
A quick note regarding representation...
This summer school is not an audition for CHAOS Actors Management, and attendance does not guarantee representation.
Melanie has built fantastic relationships with many of the UK's leading children's and young performers' agents over the past 30 years and fully respects existing agency representation. This course is designed purely to help every young actor develop their skills, confidence and professional showreel material—whether they're already represented or just starting their acting journey.
Places are strictly limited to ensure every actor receives plenty of individual coaching, rehearsal time and filming opportunities.
BOOK YOUR PLACE TODAY
https://forms.gle/8hq68hNBXqMCRBZn6

Hej!

Do kampanii reklamowej farmaceutyków poszukujemy dwójki aktorów:

Kobieta: 40-45 lat. Długie blond włosy. Aktorka

Mężczyzna: 40-45 lat. Szczupły i lekko szpakowaty. Aktor.

Zdjęcia 29/07 (środa) w Warszawie lub jej bliskich okolicach.

Prosimy o przesyłanie zgłoszeń na adres: **[bioreudzialwcastingu@gmail.com](mailto:bioreudzialwcastingu@gmail.com)** do **19/07 (niedziela) do godziny 17:00**. **Zgłoszenia muszą obowiązkowo zawierać dwa zdjęcia w załączniku wiadomości (linki do IG, FB nie będą przyjmowane) oraz selftape z wizytówką. Prosimy o przesyłanie aktualnych zdjęć portretowych oraz sylwetki. **

Dziewczynka 5-11 lat, z doświadczeniem aktorskim // Warszawa, początek sierpnia
Do filmu krótkometrażowego poszukujemy dziewczynki o CIEMNYCH włosach i NIEBIESKICH oczach, która wcieli się w młodszą wersję naszej głównej bohaterki (patrz: zdjęcie)

Rola jest mówiona

WAŻNE: konieczny BRAK alergii na kocią sierść 

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o aktualną video-wizytówkę i informację o doświadczeniu

Jeśli jest to możliwe - także linki do np zagranych etiud, czy też showreel i krótka scenka

Mail do wysyłania zgłoszeń: filmfuturia@gmail.com 

Serdecznie pozdrawiamy! 

Ekipa filmu “FUTURIA”

items.text:
CASTING - Student Short Film - F.I.R.S.T Institute 

 Looking for 2 actors  

-   A young adult male, aged 18 to 25, to play Alex, the main character, who is bored with his monotonous life and decides to participate in an experimental hypnosis treatment.  

- A male or female actor 24 or older to play a nurse.  

LOCATION: Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania   

TIME(s): Production days July 8th to 14th.  

CONTACT: Email me at [elibuchanan777@outlook.com](mailto:elibuchanan777@outlook.com) or call/text me at 724-321-7445  

This is a free student film. I will pay for transportation and a meal.

items.text:
🚨 EXTRAS NEEDED TOMORROW 🚨

A feature film is seeking extras for filming **TOMORROW, June 24** in the Tampa Bay area.

**Age:** 18–30 preferred (if you're older but can pass for college-aged, we'd still love to have you!)

**Scene:** College party

**Wardrobe:** Casual attire (no logos, bright colors, or revealing clothing)

**Location: **Tampa, FL

**Time:** 8:30 PM – 3:00 AM

**Compensation:** IMDb credit + meal provided

We understand this is an unpaid opportunity and that the late hours may not work for everyone. If you need to leave early, we would still be happy to have you join us for part of the evening.

Interested? Email **[tobey.s.munari@gmail.com](mailto:tobey.s.munari@gmail.com)** for more details.

We hope to see you there!

items.text:
# ** 🎬 CASTING CALL FOR LOCAL TV – NYC**

Hi all, We are casting for a paid local TV commercial for a financial services brand filming in the New York area.

🎭 ROLES:

• Latina Mother (40s) – Lead Role

• Latino Boy (Ages 11–14)

• Latina Grandmother (Ages 58–68)

• Voice-Over Narrator

We are seeking authentic, relatable talent with strong natural performances. Comedic timing is a plus for the lead role.

📸 PROJECT DETAILS:
* Filming Location: New York Area (Brooklyn and Queens each day)
* Paid Roles (2-Year Usage)
* Tentative Shoot Dates: June 29–30 (subject to change due to weather)

📺 SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:

Please email your submission to: jihyun@arkseido.com

Subject Line:

[Financial Commercial] – Role Name – Your Name

Please submit:

• Headshot

• Resume

• Contact Information

• Demo Reel (if available in advance)

For the role of the Latina Mother, selected applicants will be invited to submit a short self-tape using a provided audition script.

Thank you!

-Production Manager: Jihyun Shin / Ark & Seido Production

items.text:
🎭✨ **OPEN CASTING CALL – A PLACE NOT MINE** ✨🎭

Have you ever wanted to be part of a musical? **This could be your sign!**

We're looking for passionate performers to join the cast of **A Place Not Mine**. Take a look at our available characters and see who speaks to you! 👀✨

❄️ **RIVEN | Male | 18+**
Quiet, intelligent and emotionally guarded. He speaks little but feels everything. Throughout his journey, he learns to trust, open up and let people in.
*Think: Riven (Winx Club) × Connor Murphy (Dear Evan Hansen)*

👑 **SERAPHINE | Female | 18+**
Charismatic, ambitious and admired by many. She seems perfect, but underneath is someone terrified of failing. She leads with heart, even when she hides it.
*Think: Glinda (Wicked) × Sharpay Evans (High School Musical)*

🌼 **AURORA | Female | 18+**
Warm, kind and compassionate. She's the peacemaker of the group and finds strength in her kindness rather than her words.
*Think: Mitchie Torres (Camp Rock)*

⚡ **SELENE | Female | 18+**
Funny, chaotic and always talking. She's the person who says what everyone else is thinking and is fiercely loyal to her friends.
*Think: Alex Russo (Wizards of Waverly Place)*

🎭 **ROWAN | Male | 18+**
Dramatic, loud and never short on words. The comic relief of the group who loves theatre, attention and life itself.
*Think: Ryan Evans (High School Musical)*

💎 **ELARA | Female | 18+**
Calm, intelligent and sarcastic. She sees through people before they even realise it and will always protect her friends—in her own way.
*Think: Jade West (Victorious)*

☀️ **ORIS | Male | 18+**
Funny, curious and endlessly optimistic—the heart of the group. Behind all the jokes is someone who genuinely and deeply cares.
*Think: Olaf (Frozen) × Donkey (Shrek)*

📚 **PROFESSOR SYLAS | Male | Playing Age 30–40**
Intelligent, disciplined and highly respected. He believes strongly in order, responsibility and tradition, but as the story unfolds, he begins to question whether following the rules is always the right thing to do.
*Think: Severus Snape (Harry Potter)*

👑 **HEADMISTRESS VESPERA | Female | Playing Age 30–40**
Calm, elegant and composed. She carries the weight of leading Novaterra and always appears to have everything under control, but she's forced to make difficult decisions to protect the institution she loves.
*Think: Professor McGonagall (Harry Potter) × Madame Morrible (Wicked)*

✨ **Which character sounds like you?**

📅 **Auditions: 19 July 2026**
📍 **Middlesex University, London**
💻 Online auditions can also be arranged if you can't attend in person.

This is currently an **unpaid independent production**.

📩 **DM @a.place.not.mine** with the character you'd like to audition for, and we'll send you a scene and song to prepare.

**Maybe your place is here. 💙✨**

Gunsmoke Productions LLC now casting for the new psycho thriller film

NEEDED IMMEDIATELY:

1 Handsome and fit Caucasian Male 50s for cooperate type father with darkside (secretly sleezy) type.

1 Caucasian male early to late 30s but could pass for younger in flash back scenes. Basketball player height/ athlete type.  Role of the unsuspecting killer.

EXTRAS/BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED AS WELL

African American female early 20s to pass for hs girls basketball player needed. 

Office scene background actors needed any race. 

Background of all races needed in early 20 and early 30s for senior prom scene and college party and  reunion party scenes

Caucasian Male needed for small town deputy sheriff type needed.

NON-UNION

Compensation: Residuals/royalties/profitsharing

The series will be filmed in the Upstate S.C. area.

Auditions will be held via Google Meet conference call. If you know you can not attend virtual table reads,  are not consistently available please do not reply. 

For more information and consideration email us at gunsmokeproductionsllc@gmail.com 

Please include 2 unfiltered face pic and 2 full body shot along with your age, contact number and current city. ABOLUTELY NO AI PICS 

SUBMISSIONS WITHOUT REQUIRED INFO AND PICS WILL NOT GET A RESPONSE

Serious inquires only. SERIOUS MEANS SERIOUS!!

sharedPost.text:
Stage West Playhouse™ Announces Auditions for The Addams Family!

They're creepy, they're kooky, mysterious and spooky... and they're coming to Stage West Playhouse!

Director Brady Lay,  Music Director Osario Duraes, and Choreographer Lori Kohan are excited to announce auditions for our 2026 production of The Addams Family! This is the full ADULT cast version, there are limited roles for children. 

Audition Dates
Saturday, July 18, 2026 – 6:00 PM
Sunday, July 19, 2026 – 5:00 PM

Performance Dates
October 16–25, 2026

What to Expect
Auditioners should be prepared to:

Sing a 1–2 minute selection in the style of the show (a blue tooth speaker will be available).

Participate in cold reads from the script.

Learn and perform a short dance combination.
Dance Attire

Please wear clothing you can comfortably move in and closed-toe shoes.

No Crocs, sandals, flip-flops, or other open-toed footwear will be permitted during choreography.

Please bring a bottle of water, we always want you hydrated!

Video Auditions
Can't attend in person?

Video submissions will be accepted through 5:00 PM on Sunday, July 19, 2026.

Please email all video auditions to yamusicfl@gmail.com no later than the deadline.

Questions for Director Brady Lay may be directed to: yamusicfl@gmail.com.

About the Show
A comical feast that embraces the wackiness in every family, The Addams Family is a delightfully macabre musical comedy based on the beloved characters created by Charles Addams. When Wednesday Addams falls in love with a "normal" young man and invites his family to dinner, secrets, surprises, and hilarious chaos ensue in this heartfelt story about love, family, and growing up.

Principal Roles
Gomez Addams (Baritone/Tenor – Bb2–G4)
The passionate patriarch of the Addams family. Charismatic, romantic, funny, and devoted to Morticia while struggling to keep Wednesday's secret.

Morticia Addams (Alto/Mezzo – G3–Bb5)
Elegant, mysterious, and the calm center of the Addams household. Dry wit, strong presence, and deeply in love with Gomez.

Wednesday Addams (Mezzo/Soprano with strong belt – A3–E5) actor age: 17-25
Independent, intelligent, and fiercely loyal. The ultimate princess of darkness who unexpectedly falls in love.

Uncle Fester (Tenor/Character Tenor – C3–G4)
The lovable narrator of the story. Quirky, optimistic, and searching for his own true love... the Moon.

Pugsley Addams (Child/Young Teen Voice – A3–F5)
Wednesday's mischievous younger brother who fears his sister is growing up and leaving him behind.

Grandma (Character Alto/Mezzo – G3–G5)
The feisty, outrageous grandmother with a flair for potions, mischief, and saying exactly what's on her mind.

Lurch (Bass – Eb2–E4)
The towering family butler. Mostly silent... until he isn't. A memorable comedic role.

Mal Beineke (Baritone – C3–F4)
Lucas's practical, conservative father who prefers order over chaos.

Alice Beineke (Mezzo/Soprano – Ab3–G#5)
Lucas's sweet, tightly wound mother who discovers a whole new side of herself during dinner with the Addamses.

Lucas Beineke (Tenor – C3–C5)
A sincere, "normal" young man deeply in love with Wednesday.

Ensemble
The Ancestors are featured throughout the show as spirits of the Addams family from every era of history. This energetic ensemble sings, dances, and helps tell the story while portraying a wide variety of unforgettable characters.

Whether you're a longtime Stage West performer or auditioning for the very first time, we'd love to see you. Come join us for one of Broadway's funniest and most beloved musicals!

items.text:
Global Casting Call

Wardrobe fitting: August 4; Shooting in Thailand: One or two days between August 8–10.

Mobile phone commercial shoot.

1️⃣ Claire (Visual age: 30+; White or Latina; Role: Designer/Friend of the female lead; An intelligent woman with an urban, stylish vibe and a distinctive personality).

2️⃣ Zoey (Visual age: 25–26; "Traveler" persona; Approachable and relaxed; Natural curls or short hair; Infectious smile).

3️⃣ Male or Female Singer (Visual age: 20–35; Superstar presence; Capable of commanding the stage—soloist or band; No long hair; Distinctive style).

To apply, please submit: Model card (comp card) + self-introduction video + TV commercial portfolio + lifestyle and artistic photos.

💰 20,000 RMB/day (40,000 RMB for two days; rate covers fitting, shooting, and any waiting days).

Usage rights: Global, all-media, one-year term (video and print).

Application note: Please specify your current city and nationality.

contact me：tonieway@gmail.com or my facebook

3️⃣ Male or Female Singer (Visual age: 20–35; Superstar presence; Capable of commanding the stage—soloist or band; No long hair; Distinctive style).

To apply, please submit: Model card (comp card) + self-introduction video + TV commercial portfolio + lifestyle and artistic photos.

💰 20,000 RMB/day (40,000 RMB for two days; rate covers fitting, shooting, and any waiting days).

Usage rights: Global, all-media, one-year term (video and print).

Application note: Please specify your current city and nationality.

contact me：tonieway@gmail.com or my facebook

!!!  PILNE  !!!   WARSZAWA   !!!   GLINIARZE   !!!

Do kolejnego lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję aktora do roli:

Roman (35-55) – pedof*l, zwabia dzieci do vana. Spokojny, cierpliwy, metodyczny w działaniu. Nie jest agresywny, ale jest dziwny i creepy.  AKTOR  - KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Daty: 21 i 22.07
Stawki: 1400 zł netto za całość

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
**🎬Kraków - zlecenie płatne 💰**

🙋‍♀️**Poszukujemy kobiety w wieku 20-35 lat**, do głównej roli w filmie promocyjnym. 
Rola polega na wcieleniu się w turystykę zwiedzającą Kraków oraz korzystającą z jego atrakcji. 

📍Rola bez kwestii mówionych. Do roli nie jest wymagane duże doświadczenie aktorskie. Sceny do odegrania są proste, ale ważne jest, aby dobrze czuć się przed kamerą.

📆**Planowany termin realizacji: dwa dni zdjęciowe - najprawdopodobniej 11 i 12 sierpnia.**

Pola eksploatacji: internet/outdoor (DOOH)

⚠️ Realizacja filmu jest uzależniona od warunków pogodowych dlatego możliwe jest przesunięcie terminu nagrań podanych powyżej. Z tego samego względu preferujemy osoby z Krakowa. 

📩 **Zgłoszenia wraz z aktualnymi zdjęciami (portretowe oraz sylwetki) proszę kierować na adres: marcinkarkosza@grandfox.pl**

items.text:
# 🎬 CASTING CALL | *GREEN ROOM*

**"Is holding onto someone worth losing yourself?"**

In 2005, two teenage best friends discover a mysterious hidden room inside their high school that reveals visions of their futures, forcing one of them to choose between loyalty and the life he truly wants.

We're currently casting for our upcoming Vancouver Film School short film, **Green Room**, and are looking for passionate performers to join the project! We welcome both experienced actors and those who are just starting out.

If you're interested, please send your **headshot, self-tape, resume (if available), and demo reel (if available)** to:

**📧 ****[greenroomshortfilm@gmail.com](mailto:greenroomshortfilm@gmail.com)**

Due to our production schedule, **we will be casting directly from self-tapes.** We will **not** be holding in-person callbacks or a second round of auditions, as we are working with a very quick turnaround.

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!
## Production Information

**Location:** Vancouver, BC
**Shoot Dates:** July 30, July 31 & August 1, 2026
**Production:** Vancouver Film School
**Genre:** Coming-of-Age / Supernatural Drama
**Union Status:** Strictly Non - Union performers
**Compensation:** Volunteer / Non-paid. IMDb credit, demo reel footage, meals/craft services, and a **$10/day lunch stipend** will be provided.
## Roles
**ORRIN** *(Lead)*

**Male | Asian | Playing Age 18 - 25**

Orrin is charismatic, funny, impulsive, and impossible to ignore. He uses humor and reckless behavior to hide how deeply insecure he feels about himself and his future. Unlike Malik, Orrin has already convinced himself that he will never escape his hometown or become anything more than what he grew up around. He masks his fear with jokes, but underneath that energy is someone terrified of being abandoned and left behind by the one person who truly understands him—Malik. Orrin depends heavily on their friendship, even if he would never openly admit it. He is energetic, emotionally reactive, and constantly searching for distraction so he doesn't have to confront his own hopelessness. Despite his flaws, he is deeply lovable and genuinely cares about Malik.

**MR. BLOCK** *(Supporting)*

**Male | Any Ethnicity | Playing Age 35+**

The principal of Lawson High School. Strict, blunt, and tired of dealing with students who waste their potential. While he comes across as intimidating and frustrated, there is genuine concern underneath his authority.
## Audition Process

**🎥 Self-Tape Deadline:** **July 16, 2026**

Please submit:
* Headshot
* Self-tape
* Resume (if available)
* Demo reel (if available)

Casting decisions will be made directly from submitted self-tapes. Due to our production timeline, there will be **no callbacks or second-round auditions**.

We look forward to seeing your submissions!

items.text:
CASTING CALL - "SLEEPOVER MOVIE" 

In the spring of 2016, 12 year old Alissa gets invited to a sleepover by the coolest girl she knows. But when things don't go to plan, she is forced to confront her insecurities in the maze of her mind.

Looking for volunteers to cast in this project! We are super open to having non-actors or actors at all levels of experience. If you are interested, please submit a headshot, introductory paragraph, resume or demo reel (whatever you have access to is perfect) to sleepovermovie2016@gmail.com.

Feel free to reach out on fb if you have any questions. 

Info/characters:

Vancouver, BC

August 8-9 

Non-union, volunteer 

And here are the roles!

• ALISSA  –  12 (Actor's age is flexible) Alissa is an angsty and socially awkward preteen who is used to finding herself on the outskirts of friend groups. She idealises the lives of girls who can easily belong.

• RACHEL - 12 - Outgoing and confident, she has been friends with Alissa since they were little. 

• TONYA - 12 The cooler, richer girl that stole Alissa’s best friend Rachel. Behind her glamorous facade, Tonya is compulsively obsessed with giving the appearance of a perfect life and maintaining her perfect best friend.

• NATALIE - 12 (Actor must be francophone) She is friends with Tonya and best friends with Natasha. 

• NATASHA - 12 - Likes to think of herself as more grown-up and nonchalant than the other girls. She is best friends with Natalie. 

 •JULES - 12 - She is a conformist who thrives on Tonya’s attention.

In the spring of 2016, 12 year old Alissa gets invited to a sleepover by the coolest girl she knows. But when things don't go to plan, she is forced to confront her insecurities in the maze of her mind.

Looking for volunteers to cast in this project! We are super open to having non-actors or actors at all levels of experience. If you are interested, please submit a headshot, introductory paragraph, resume or demo reel (whatever you have access to is perfect) to sleepovermovie2016@gmail.com.

Feel free to reach out on fb if you have any questions. 

Info/characters:

Vancouver, BC

August 8-9 

Non-union, volunteer 

And here are the roles!

• ALISSA  –  12 (Actor's age is flexible) Alissa is an angsty and socially awkward preteen who is used to finding herself on the outskirts of friend groups. She idealises the lives of girls who can easily belong.

• RACHEL - 12 - Outgoing and confident, she has been friends with Alissa since they were little. 

• TONYA - 12 The cooler, richer girl that stole Alissa’s best friend Rachel. Behind her glamorous facade, Tonya is compulsively obsessed with giving the appearance of a perfect life and maintaining her perfect best friend.

• NATALIE - 12 (Actor must be francophone) She is friends with Tonya and best friends with Natasha. 

• NATASHA - 12 - Likes to think of herself as more grown-up and nonchalant than the other girls. She is best friends with Natalie. 

 •JULES - 12 - She is a conformist who thrives on Tonya’s attention.
items.title: CASTING CALL - "SLEEPOVER MOVIE"

items.text:
🎬 SCRIPTWRITERS WANTED LENICO PRODUCTIONS ✍️
I’m currently developing a zero budget independent film based in Liverpool and I’m looking for passionate scriptwriters who want to collaborate and help bring an original story to life.

This is a great opportunity to build your portfolio, gain experience, and be part of an ambitious independent production from the ground up.

What you’ll gain from being involved:

✍️ Official writing credit on the final production

🎬 See your ideas developed into a real film project

📁 Build your writing portfolio and screenplay experience

🤝 Collaborate with actors, directors and other creatives

🌟 Gain valuable experience within an independent film production

📽️ Potential opportunities to work on future Lenico Productions projects

🎭 Have your storytelling showcased on screen

I’m looking for writers interested in:

🎭 Crime

🎬 Drama

⚡ Thriller

🧟 Horror

😂 Comedy

📺 TV & Film

Whether you’re experienced or just starting out, if you’ve got ideas and enjoy storytelling, I’d love to hear from you.

📧 Email: cheethamlennie55@gmail.com

If this sounds like something you’d enjoy, or you know someone who might be interested, please get in touch or share this post.

🎥 Let’s create something together.

#Scriptwriter #Screenwriter #Liverpool #IndependentFilm #ZeroBudgetFilm #Filmmaking #Screenplay #WritersWanted #LenicoProductions

items.text:
**** PAID CASTING NOTICE ****

Towers Film LV Productions is seeking a talented actress for its upcoming indie feature film.

Title: Towers

Tagline: Love is the signal that crosses every dimension

Synopsis: After their mother mysteriously disappears, two teenage sisters embark on an unforgettable journey that leads them to an ancient alien secret hidden beneath the Nevada desert.

Shoot Dates: August 1-2, 2026

Location: Las Vegas, NV

Shoot Length: 2 days

Rate: $200 flat

Union Status: Non-Union

ROLE:

PETRA 16yr (Supporting)

Female identifying, ages 18-24. Think Dustin from Stranger Things — super smart, funny and witty. Genuine comedic chops a must. Multicultural background preferred — Filipina, Pacific Islander, Southeast Asian or mixed heritage for this role.

$100 provided for travel to Las Vegas + hotel and meals, copy + profit participation in the project. Additional filming days end of Sept and Oct TBD. 

TO SUBMIT

Please send the following to: towerslvfilm@gmail.com

* Headshot

* Resume

* Acting reel or performance clips (required)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — PAID NON-UNION FEATURE FILM**

Seeking actors for principal roles in an indie psychological thriller feature filming in Southern California.

**Paid. Non-Union.**

**SYNOPSIS**

After a bitter family dinner, Chloe storms out and crashes her car on a remote country road. Disoriented and suffering from head trauma and sudden hearing distortion, she stumbles upon an isolated Victorian house, where she is taken in by Colin, a seemingly kind but socially awkward man.

As Chloe struggles to recover, small inconsistencies begin to surface. What first appears to be a refuge slowly reveals itself as something far more dangerous. Cut off from the outside world, Chloe must determine whether Colin is an eccentric recluse—or something far more sinister—as the line between protector and captor begins to disappear.

**CHLOE — LEAD FEMALE, MID-20s**

A singer who is perceptive, emotionally restrained, and quietly isolated. Chloe begins the story guarded and conflict-avoidant, but after a traumatic accident leaves her with severe hearing distortion and partial hearing loss, she is forced to confront fear, violence, and survival head-on.

The role requires strong emotional range, subtle internal performance, vulnerability, physical endurance, and the ability to escalate naturally into raw survival instinct.

**Lead role with substantial screen time.**

**COLIN — LEAD MALE, EARLY 40s**

Thin, impeccably dressed, polite, soft-spoken, and painfully socially awkward. Colin appears slightly frozen in another era, with a neat 1950s-inspired appearance and an intense longing for human connection.

Beneath his gentle demeanor is a deeply disturbed and unpredictable man whose warped ideas about love and preservation gradually reveal themselves through manipulation, control, and violence.

The role requires subtlety, emotional restraint, vulnerability, quiet intensity, and the ability to shift naturally from kindness to terrifying obsession without becoming theatrical or one-dimensional.

**Lead role with substantial screen time.**

**ADAM — SUPPORTING MALE, LATE 20s**

Ambitious, intelligent, driven, and outwardly confident. Adam values stability, success, and control and often believes he knows what is best for his girlfriend, Chloe.

When Chloe disappears, his determination to find her reveals a more vulnerable, courageous, and selfless side beneath his controlling exterior.

The role requires naturalism, strong dramatic instincts, and the ability to move from subtle relationship tension into high-stakes suspense, action, and emotional vulnerability.

**PRODUCTION DETAILS**

**Genre:** Psychological thriller
**Location:** Los Angeles
**Compensation:** Paid
**Union Status:** Non-Union

To submit, please send your **headshot and DEMO REEL** to: **production@thefilms.io**

Please include the **role you are submitting for in the subject line**.

Selected applicants will receive additional project details and audition materials.

items.text:
Here’s a friendly post you can share:

Hi everyone! I’m currently looking for a film industry internship so I can complete my graduation requirement. If anyone knows of any opportunities or has any connections, I’d really appreciate it!

I’m open to anything related to film production, media, television, cinematography, production assistance, or other behind-the-scenes roles. A paid internship would be preferred, but I’m open to hearing about all opportunities.

I’m mainly looking in the Connecticut, New York, or Boston area.

If you know of anything, please let me know or send me a message. Thank you so much!

items.title: Multi-skilled DUO:

items.text:
💰TRAVEL AND FOOD/DRINK ON DAY WILL BE PAID FOR 

LOGLINE- ‘’A grieving couple struggle to reconnect after an unimaginable loss, finding themselves united only by memories.

🎥 After, April is an intimate, dialogue-free short film exploring grief, guilt and unconditional love. Through carefully observed moments and powerful visual storytelling, two expectant parents attempt to navigate the silence left behind after tragedy. As they confront blame, heartbreak and the fear of moving forward, a small teddy bear with angel wings becomes a symbol of the child they lost.

👫Looking for a male and female lead, any ethnicity (ages of 25-35).
🧍‍♀️Lydia- This role relies almost entirely on subtle facial expressions and physical performance rather than dialogue.
🧍Liam- A nuanced, naturalistic performance is essential.

items.summary:
💰TRAVEL AND FOOD/DRINK ON DAY WILL BE PAID FOR 

LOGLINE- ‘’A grieving couple struggle to reconnect after an unimaginable loss, finding themselves united only by memories.

🎥 After, April is an intimate, dialogue-free short film exploring grief, guilt and unconditional love. Through carefully observed moments and powerful visual storytelling, two expectant parents attempt to navigate the silence left behind after tragedy. As they confront blame, heartbreak and the fear of moving forward, a small teddy bear with angel wings becomes a symbol of the child they lost.

👫Looking for a male and female lead, any ethnicity (ages of 25-35).
🧍‍♀️Lydia- This role relies almost entirely on subtle facial expressions and physical performance rather than dialogue.
🧍Liam- A nuanced, naturalistic performance is essential.

📍Filming in Birmingham, England (in apartment) 1st-2nd September 2026.

⚠️This film covers topics some may find harmful; Child-loss, grief, emotional distress and mental health. 

IF INTERESTED PLEASE CONTACT:

items.text:
Expression-led, casting-ready headshots that read clearly on Spotlight and other casting platforms.

If you want to work in the comfort of your home (or a place near you), I can come with the studio to you. If you don't mind travelling, you're welcome in my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to reach out via DM or via:

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

NOW CASTING TEEN GIRLS IN LOS ANGELES!
16 to 19y
Do you love earrings and have an awesome ear stack? We're looking for a cool, outgoing teenage girl who already has at least two pierced holes in each ear and is open to adding another piercing to continue her stack.
💰 Pays $600 for the shoot
💰 PLUS an additional $2,500 if your images are selected for use in the social media and email campaign
📍 Los Angeles Area Only
📅 Shoots August 6–7
To submit, send us a quick video:
• Tell us a little about yourself
• Show us your earrings and ear stack
• Tell us why you love them and what they mean to you
We can't wait to see your style!

Email me at: Jacqui@pitmancastingprojects.com

WEŹ UDZIAŁ W NOWYM PROJEKCIE! 🎬

Ruszamy z castingiem do randkowego programu tv! Szukamy osób z 
charakterem, które nie boją się wyzwań, uwielbiają rozmawiać i chcą 
przeżyć niesamowitą przygodę przed kamerą. 🌟

Nasz program opiera się na autentycznych emocjach, spontanicznych 
reakcjach i interakcjach na żywo. Jeśli jesteś singlem/singielką i masz

w sobie „to coś” – czekamy właśnie na Ciebie!

👫 KOGO SZUKAMY?
✅ Kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 18-30 lat.
✅ Osób otwartych, komunikatywnych i przebojowych.
✅ Swobodnych przed kamerą i potrafiących ciekawie o sobie opowiadać.
✅ Osób o zadbanej aparycji, które są naturalne i autentyczne.
✅ Każdego, kto realnie chce poznać nowe osoby i nie boi się wyrażać 
własnego zdania!

Kluczowa jest dla nas Twoja energia i umiejętność prowadzenia ciekawej 
rozmowy. 💬

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?
Wyślij maila na adres: zgloszenia@castingstudio.pl

W treści zgłoszenia podaj:
1️⃣ Imię i nazwisko
2️⃣ Wiek
3️⃣ Numer telefonu do kontaktu
4️⃣ Dołącz 3 aktualne zdjęcia (twarz oraz sylwetka – wyraźne, bez

filtrów)

Nie zwlekaj! Daj sobie szansę na nowe znajomości i udział w wyjątkowym 
formacie. Może to właśnie Ciebie szukamy? 🌹✨

sharedPost.text:
Aspiring/Beginner Actors: Are you looking for some screen acting guidance and mentorship?🎬🌟

Hi, I’m Emma! I’m an Actress and Screen Acting Mentor based in the UK.

I’ve been involved in many productions for companies such as the BBC, Channel 4, Manchester Film School, SAE Liverpool and more.

The aim of the sessions is to give guidance on beginner screen actors who want tips on screen acting techniques and feedback on auditions, self tapes or monologues! My sessions are casual and informal, and are completely tailored to the individual and their level. I am DBS Checked.

All my lessons are online!

Before booking a session, I offer a FREE 10 min consultation, either by video call or phone. This is an opportunity for us to meet and discuss what you would want out of a session, and how I can best help you.

If you decide after the consultation you would like to book an online session, this can be arranged at a time that suits you!

Please message me if you’re interested in booking a free consultation, or simply want to know more about how I can help you☺️

Instagram: @taketwoacting

Thank you!

items.text:
Darsteller:innen für Werbedreh in Berlin und Düsseldorf
Für eine hochwertige Werbeproduktion suchen wir 20 Darsteller:innen im Alter von 18 bis 45 Jahren.

WICHTIG: Ihr müsst wirklich aus Berlin oder Düsseldorf kommen!

Drehort: Berlin

Drehtermin: 05.08.

Drehort: Düsseldorf 

Drehtermin: 03.08.

Einsatzzeit: Maximal 6 Stunden pro Person.

Gage: 1.750 € inklusive Nutzungsrechte und Reisekosten.

Nutzungsrechte:

- Digital

- OOH

- VoD

- Online Paid

- All Print

- Deutschland

- Laufzeit: 1 Jahr

Rechnungsstellung ist möglich.

Worauf wir achten

Wir suchen Menschen,

- die sympathisch sind.

- die glaubwürdig wirken.

- die authentisch sprechen – es muss nicht alles perfektes Hochdeutsch sein.

- die eine Macher-Ausstrahlung haben (nicht Macker). Macher:innen sind Menschen, die den Mut haben, Dinge anzupacken.

- die Optimismus und Aufbruch vermitteln.

- die Emotionen zulassen.

- die neugierig und offen sind.

- die Lust haben, über das Thema Altersvorsorge zu sprechen – menschlich, authentisch und echt.

Wir suchen keine Expert:innen.

Fachkenntnisse sind nicht erforderlich. Wir möchten keine auswendig gelernten Sätze oder werblichen Verkaufstexte hören. Uns interessieren echte Gedanken, ehrliche Meinungen und authentische Menschen.

Bitte bewerbt euch auf Kiezkomparsen.de. Füllt ein vollständiges Profil aus und schreibt mir eine DM mit eurem Vor- und Nachnamen, wenn ihr euch beworben habt. Danach bekommt ihr dann alle weiteren Infos.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT PSYCHOLOGICAL THRILLER

We are casting for an upcoming independent short film based on a psychological thriller.

Available Roles:

 NORMA Lewis (Female, late 20s–late 30s)
A thoughtful, ambitious office worker whose curiosity leads her into a life-changing moral dilemma. Strong emotional range is essential.

ARTHUR Lewis  (Male, late 20s–late 30s)
Norma's husband. Honest, intelligent, and guided by strong moral principles. Calm, caring, and capable of delivering emotionally grounded performances.

MR. STEWARD (Male, 40–70)
A mysterious, polite, and well-dressed stranger. Calm, confident, and unsettling without raising his voice. A commanding screen presence is required.

Filming Location: Vancouver, BC (or surrounding area)
Project: Independent Short Film
Genre: Psychological Thriller

Who We're Looking For:

Passionate actors of all experience levels are welcome.
Reliable, professional, and committed performers.
 Must be available for rehearsals and filming dates (to be discussed).

If you're interested, please send:

 Your name
 Age
 Recent headshot or clear photos
 Acting résumé (if available)
 Demo reel 
 Contact information

Please send your submission via Facebook Messenger or email: yarghaal@gmail.com

Feel free to share this post with anyone who may be interested.

We look forward to working with talented actors and bringing this story to life!

items.text:
# PAID CASTING - HUMAN PINBALL SCENE-DEVELOPMENT LAB

**Location:** Vancouver, BC
**Compensation:** $25 CAD per hour (minimum three paid hours per scheduled rehearsal or workshop)
**Union Status:** Nonunion

Casting Vancouver-based performers for an initial paid scene-development lab for **Human Pinball**, an original one-hour dark-comedy television series.

The series follows Ren, a trans man revisiting a chaotic period of his life involving dating, identity, police encounters, addiction and sobriety, failed ambition, and the enormous gap between how events felt at the time and how he understands them now.

This is **not** currently a full stage production or a theatrical adaptation of the complete pilot. Initial paid rehearsals will explore selected scenes from the series, with an emphasis on discovering character chemistry, comic rhythm, emotional truth, and which performers make the material impossible to ignore.

The work may incorporate minimal staging, voiceover, projected material, and fast transitions between past and present.

Strong performers and combinations may be invited into future paid workshops or public performances, but no larger production, ongoing company role, or filmed proof of concept is currently guaranteed.

## Roles
PAST REN - Lead

**Playing age:** Late 20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Trans man
**Ethnicity:** Open

Ren before medical and social transition. He is impulsive, sincere, defensive, resourceful, romantically overconfident, emotionally chaotic, and unintentionally funny.

Past Ren must be played as the same boy and man we meet later in the timeline - not as a lesbian, a woman performing masculinity, or someone consciously trying to appear masculine. He is already completely Ren internally, even though the people around him perceive him differently.

The role requires grounded comic instincts, emotional vulnerability, romantic confidence, and the ability to make Ren's wildly optimistic interpretations feel completely sincere.

Performers of all gender identities are welcome to submit if they are comfortable portraying the character on these terms.

JUNE - Supporting

**Playing age:** Mid-20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Woman
**Ethnicity:** Open

Confident, socially fluid, attractive without performing for attention, and difficult for Ren to read accurately.

The role requires understated comic timing, natural presence, and the ability to create believable romantic and sexual tension through genuine connection rather than heightened performance.

ELISE - Supporting

**Playing age:** Mid-20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Woman
**Ethnicity:** Open

Direct, charismatic, emotionally intelligent, and comfortable challenging Ren's assumptions.

Requires grounded flirtation, strong chemistry, quick comic instincts, and ease with emotionally charged dialogue.

## Compensation & Schedule

**Rate:** $25 CAD per hour

**Minimum:** Three paid hours per scheduled rehearsal or workshop

**Location:** Vancouver, BC

**Initial Schedule:** Approximately 2–4 paid sessions during July and August 2026, scheduled around cast availability.

Any future rehearsals, workshops, staged presentations, public performances, or additional work will be offered and compensated separately. Continued involvement is not guaranteed.

No travel or accommodation is provided. Applicants must be based in Metro Vancouver or able to work locally.

## Content

No nudity or simulated sex.

The material includes mature language and references to dating, sexuality, alcohol, drug use, addiction, police restraint and arrest, gender dysphoria, death, financial distress, and emotionally vulnerable autobiographical experiences.

Specific scene content and physical requirements will be disclosed before rehearsals or auditions. Performer boundaries and consent will be respected throughout the process.

## How to Submit

Please reply directly to this post or email info@crowdcue.ca

Include:
* Your name
* The role you'd like to be considered for
* Your location
* Acting résumé or brief experience summary
* Headshot or recent photo
* A link to an existing reel, self-tape, scene, or other performance footage
* Your general availability during July and August 2026

A custom audition tape is **not** required for the initial submission. Shortlisted performers will receive a brief audition scene and character context for the next stage.

Please use the subject line:

**HUMAN PINBALL CASTING - [ROLE]**

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - SHORT FILM LIVERPOOL (UNPAID) - NO PRIOR EXPERIENCE NEEDED**

**Location:** L8

**Date:** August 1st (1 day shooting)

**Rate: **Unpaid but expenses covered

Casting **2 male actors in their mid-20s to early 30s** for a quiet, dialogue-led short film following two friends sharing a celebratory smoke after one of them has been promoted.

**Roles:**

**Matt **is dry and sarcastic. He's a working class guy who has managed to work his way up the ladder at his job, and although he is excited for the future, he's conflicted about what he'll have to leave behind.

**Shane **is warm, but quick-witted. He supports his friend, but understands that every step Matt takes forward threatens to leave him behind.

I'm looking for actors interested in naturalistic work and are comfortable letting moments breathe. Chemistry between both roles is vital for this film, so applying together with another actor as a pair will put you at the top of my list for consideration. As this is an unpaid role and my first narrative short, I am happy to consider all applications, even if you have not acted before.

If interested please send your reel, a recent self tape (if you've got one) along with a headshot and some info about yourself (and your partner if you are applying as a pair) to

morningsmokecasting@gmail.com

Thank you, I look forward to hearing from you all!

topComments.text: I’m interested and sent over a Email

sharedPost.text:
Aspiring/Beginner Actors: Are you looking for some screen acting guidance and mentorship?🎬🌟

Hi, I’m Emma! I’m an Actress and Screen Acting Mentor based in the UK.

I’ve been involved in many productions for companies such as the BBC, Channel 4, Manchester Film School, SAE Liverpool and more.

The aim of the sessions is to give guidance on beginner screen actors who want tips on screen acting techniques and feedback on auditions, self tapes or monologues! My sessions are casual and informal, and are completely tailored to the individual and their level. I am DBS Checked.

All my lessons are online!

Before booking a session, I offer a FREE 10 min consultation, either by video call or phone. This is an opportunity for us to meet and discuss what you would want out of a session, and how I can best help you.

If you decide after the consultation you would like to book an online session, this can be arranged at a time that suits you!

Please message me if you’re interested in booking a free consultation, or simply want to know more about how I can help you☺️

Instagram: @taketwoacting

Thank you!

CASTING - PILNE: Tancerze - Panowie, z Warszawy, dobrze zbudowani - casting: potrzebuję jeszcze kilka osób do naszego projektu. Dobrze zbudowanych (umięśnionych i +175 cm) zawodowych tancerzy. Różne style - ale wyłącznie z doświadczeniem na scenie.  Najbliższe zlecenia do obsadzenia: 22.08 Warszawa (w ciągu dnia i próba generalna dzień wcześniej wieczorem)  i 
22.10 pod Warszawą, wieczorem  . 
średnio po 2-3 próby pod dany show. Oba zlecenia to eventy firmowe, w jednym z nich tańczymy taniec grecki (sitraki/zorba) oraz stylizację na Spartan (tu kostium bez koszulki) . Możliwość zostania na dłużej. Zgłoszenia na priv lub mail grupa@tancerze.pl . Chętnych, jeśli się nie znamy, zaproszę na spotkanie, przy metro Kondratowicza, najchętniej w sobotę wieczorem (lub podaj inny termin w ciągu najbliższych dni).

Uwaga, o wyborze tancerzy decyduje klient, dlatego otrzymacie umowę castingową, potrzebuję 4 zdjęcia, wzrost i opis doświdczenia krótki. Podajcie również Waszą stawkę za job. 
Mozna do mnie dzwonić 602 406 111 jeśli macie pytania

items.text:
❕CASTING CALL❕

FOULMOUTH Theatre is casting for an upcoming production and we’re looking for 4 male and/or non-binary performers with a playing age of 18 to 30 based in or around Manchester.

This is for a comedy that we’ll be announcing very soon. For now, we’re keeping the details under wraps, but we’re particularly interested in hearing from members of the LGBTQ+ community.

If you’d like to receive further information, please email your interest and a little bit about yourself to:

info@foulmouth.uk

with:
• Your name
• Your location
• A recent headshot
• Your Spotlight link (or acting cv)

The deadline for applications is 12PM ON MONDAY 22nd OF JUNE. We will not be accepting any applications past this time.

We’ll then send over the full casting information and audition details 🙂 We can’t wait to hear from you💋

#castingcall #casting #manchestercasting

items.text:
**PAID SOCIAL MEDIA COMMERCIAL / SHORT FORM VIDEO CAMPAIGN**

CREW CALL: Director, Cinematographer, Editor, Producer

CASTING: Male & Female Actors, Ages 18-26, All Ethnicities

LOCATION: Los Angeles, CA

TIME(S): Accepting submissions now. Shoot dates TBD (July-August 2026)

CONTACT: team@joinswoo.com 

Swoo is a startup building a platform that helps college students make friends and discover events, activities, and communities around campus.

We are producing a series of cinematic 15-30 second social media videos focused on friendship, belonging, community, and authentic student experiences. The creative direction is closer to a short film than a traditional advertisement.

PAID OPPORTUNITY.

Seeking filmmakers with strong visual storytelling skills and actors who can portray natural, authentic college-aged characters.

Please send:
* Portfolio, reel, or previous work
* Role you are applying for
* Relevant experience
* Availability

Los Angeles-based applicants preferred. Thank you!

items.text:
Student Short Film in NYC

Looking for a Black or Hispanic Actor age 21 - 30 years old.

LOCATION: NYC, Brooklyn, Prospect Park. 

COMPENSATION: Non-pay, Food, Credit and Copy

CONTACT: [Joeymartinezflores@gmail.com](mailto:Joeymartinezflores@gmail.com) & @joeys_betterusername (Instagram)

Submission deadline is June 30th.

Hello! My name is Joey. I am a student filmmaker based in NYC. I am looking for an actor to be in my short film on July 1st. It is a one day shoot and 3 pages long. The role is a young security guard doing a shameful job to get by, has his humanity peeks through his shell after a puppet desperately wants to use the bathroom he’s guarding that is meant for humans only. Since filming is soon, we aren’t planning on holding auditions. If you can show up and pass our background check then we’d love to work with you. Thank you!

NEW KIDS 10 WEEK SCREEN ACTING COURSE SEPT- NOV Studio 96

https://screenplayacting.com/product/screen-acting-course-kids-sept-nov-2026/

We are excited to announce this brand-new kids' Screen Acting Course featuring incredible industry experts. Notably, the 10th week of the course will be led by acclaimed Director Jason Wingard. Jason is a regular director for children’s programs, including CBBC’s So Awkward Academy and CBBC So Awkward Kids Camp. He also directed 34 episodes of Coronation Street, recently worked on Hollyoaks and Emmerdale, and previously directed a recurring role on CBBC’s The Dumping Ground (which he returned to directing in January 2026).

Class Times & Pricing:

  - Ages 8–11: 11:00am - 12:00pm (£75 for the course)
  - Ages 12–Teens: 12:15pm - 1:45pm (£105 for the course)

Location:
Studio 96, Unit 1A and 1B, Sundance Court, Kansas Avenue, Salford, Media City, M50 2GZ
(FREE PARKING AVAILABLE)

Hi everyone! My name's Daniel, I'm 21 years old and based in the North East of England.

I'm currently at the beginning of my acting journey and actively looking for opportunities in film, TV, commercials, student productions and supporting artist work.

I have a full UK driving licence, I'm happy to travel for the right projects, and I'm always keen to learn and gain experience on set.

Professional headshots are booked for August, but in the meantime I'm happy to send recent photos and my acting CV if anyone is casting.

If anyone has any upcoming projects or knows of any opportunities, I'd love to hear from you.

Thanks for reading!

sharedPost.text:
The Most Dangerous Enemy You Will Ever Face Might Be the One in the Mirror

Most people spend their lives fighting difficult circumstances. But one of the hardest battles isn’t with the world—it’s with ourselves.

Think about it…

How many opportunities have you talked yourself out of?

How many dreams have you abandoned because you believed you weren’t good enough?

How many times have you replayed your mistakes while ignoring your strengths?

The truth is, your inner voice has incredible power. Research in psychology has shown that constant negative self-talk can increase stress, lower confidence, and make it harder to recover from setbacks. When you become your own harshest critic, every challenge feels bigger than it really is.

Your mind listens to what you repeatedly tell it.

If you constantly say:
❌ “I’m a failure.”
❌ “I’m not smart enough.”
❌ “Nothing ever works out for me.”

Eventually, you start believing those thoughts as facts—even when they aren’t.

But imagine replacing those thoughts with:
✅ “I’m still learning.”
✅ “Every setback is preparing me for a comeback.”
✅ “I deserve the same kindness I give to others.”

That doesn’t mean pretending life is perfect. It means choosing to become your own greatest supporter instead of your own greatest obstacle.

The strongest people aren’t those who never struggle. They’re the ones who learn to silence the voice that says, “You can’t,” and replace it with, “Keep going.”

Remember this:

You can’t build a beautiful life while constantly tearing yourself down.

Speak to yourself with compassion. Forgive your past. Celebrate small victories. Grow one step at a time.

Your future needs your encouragement more than your criticism.

💬 Let’s talk.
Have you ever been your own worst enemy? What helped you overcome negative self-talk? Your story might inspire someone who needs hope today.

❤️ If this message resonated with you, like, comment, and share it with someone who needs the reminder that they are stronger than the voice of self-doubt.

#MentalHealthMatters #SelfWorth #PositiveMindset #GrowthMindset #BelieveInYourself #HealingJourney #EmotionalWellbeing #SelfCompassion #MindsetShift #PersonalGrowth #OvercomeSelfDoubt #YouAreEnough #ChooseHope #LifeLessons #BeKindToYourself

items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Darsteller:innen für Werbedreh in Berlin und Düsseldorf
Für eine hochwertige Werbeproduktion suchen wir 20 Darsteller:innen im Alter von 18 bis 45 Jahren.

WICHTIG: Ihr müsst wirklich aus Berlin oder Düsseldorf kommen!

Drehort: Berlin

Drehtermin: 05.08.

Drehort: Düsseldorf 

Drehtermin: 03.08.

Einsatzzeit: Maximal 6 Stunden pro Person.

Gage: 1.750 € inklusive Nutzungsrechte und Reisekosten.

Nutzungsrechte:

- Digital

- OOH

- VoD

- Online Paid

- All Print

- Deutschland

- Laufzeit: 1 Jahr

Rechnungsstellung ist möglich.

Worauf wir achten

Wir suchen Menschen,

- die sympathisch sind.

- die glaubwürdig wirken.

- die authentisch sprechen – es muss nicht alles perfektes Hochdeutsch sein.

- die eine Macher-Ausstrahlung haben (nicht Macker). Macher:innen sind Menschen, die den Mut haben, Dinge anzupacken.

- die Optimismus und Aufbruch vermitteln.

- die Emotionen zulassen.

- die neugierig und offen sind.

- die Lust haben, über das Thema Altersvorsorge zu sprechen – menschlich, authentisch und echt.

Wir suchen keine Expert:innen.

Fachkenntnisse sind nicht erforderlich. Wir möchten keine auswendig gelernten Sätze oder werblichen Verkaufstexte hören. Uns interessieren echte Gedanken, ehrliche Meinungen und authentische Menschen.

Bitte bewerbt euch auf Kiezkomparsen.de. Füllt ein vollständiges Profil aus und schreibt mir eine DM mit eurem Vor- und Nachnamen, wenn ihr euch beworben habt. Danach bekommt ihr dann alle weiteren Infos.

topComments.text: Elisa Rüdiger ich habe dir geschrieben 😇

items.text:
Kick Ass Film Fest is gearing up for a massive Season 7, and we want YOU on our board. We are on a mission to build the future of indie film in our state, and we need your passion to make the 2027 Spring Festival our best yet.
What you’ll be doing: Helping us run epic Fall Meet & Greets (Pueblo, Springs, Denver, Boulder), organizing Spring screening premieres, and planning the ultimate Awards Show.
Why join?
    •    Compete anyway: You can still enter the competition!  You won’t be involved in the competition portion of planning the festival.  
    •    Level up with us: This is a volunteer role, but as we grow, there will be opportunities for these to turn into official, expanded positions.
Let’s unite the Colorado film scene. Who’s ready to make some magic? 👇 Drop a 🎥 in the comments if you want to learn more!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScSY-u1zenlnh8lXRaQi3Lr9O93x5Zg4Ca06YChhft1Db2saQ/viewform

sharedPost.text:
Kickass Film Fest is growing, and we’re looking for passionate creatives, film lovers, organizers, and community builders to join our volunteer board.

This volunteer team will help support the events leading up to our 2027 Spring Festival, including:

Fall Meet & Greet networking events (Pueblo, Springs, Denver, Boulder)
Spring screening premiere events 
Spring Festival Awards Show Planning
Note: You will not be part of the competition planning, but you can still participate in the competition.

This is a volunteer board, but as KAFF continues to grow, there may be opportunities to grow into official roles or expanded positions on a case-by-case basis.

If you want to help us for Kickass Film Fest Season 7 and help us build the future of independent film in Southern Colorado, we’d love to hear from you!

Apply here: https://forms.gle/SaF2u71YJhbFNXAq9

items.text:
Hey all you cool cats & kittens!!! Come have some fun in the sun!!! 

CFVA Summer Bash!!!!! Woohooo!!!

Join us for the CFVA Summer Bash, Colorado's can't-miss summer networking event for the production and media arts community! Whether you're behind the camera, in front of it, or making the magic happen behind the scenes, this is your chance to connect with fellow creatives in a fun, relaxed setting. Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!! 

• Sunday, August 2, 2026, 4:00 PM

• The Buntport Theater, Denver, Colorado 

• [https://bit.ly/4gyGys7](https://bit.ly/4gyGys7?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaTlPemlkOXN3WkxKVHd4cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6OaTol4XZ4rCwvvURQbhMX_d9BLstM6AH34hykXpEpYnyGg71WvbCy7R_jGQ_aem_AvAJiHw9laj5e1AQsFRXtA) 

Why Attend?
* IT'S SO FUN 
* Expand Your Network
* Meet filmmakers, producers, directors, editors, writers, actors, crew members, content creators, and industry professionals from across Colorado.
* Discover New Collaborations
* Whether you're looking for your next project, your next client, or your next creative partner, Summer Bash is the perfect place to start the conversation.
* Strengthen the Colorado Artist Community - across the mediums!! Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!!
* Build meaningful relationships, share ideas, and help grow a stronger, more connected community throughout the state.
* Celebrate the Industry
* Take a break from production schedules and enjoy an afternoon with the people who make Colorado's media industry thrive.

Event Highlights

• Free Admission – Everyone is welcome, but registration is encouraged.

• Food Trucks On Site – Grab dinner or a snack from a selection of local food trucks offering a variety of delicious options for purchase.

• Indoor & Outdoor Venue – Stay cool and comfortable at the unique Buntport Theater. 

• Networking & Community – Make new connections, reconnect with familiar faces, and celebrate Colorado's vibrant production/performing arts industry.

Whether you're a longtime CFVA member, new to the industry, or simply curious about Colorado's creative community, the CFVA Summer Bash is a welcoming opportunity to meet new people, exchange ideas, and build relationships that can lead to future collaborations.

Register today and join us on August 2 for an afternoon of community, conversation, and connection. We can't wait to see you at the Summer Bash!

items.text:
Hello all, 

First off, thank you for your overwhelming support and application for “Miss. Lonelyhearts Memory Light” - I made a post on here for our feature a few weeks ago and received way more engagement than I expected. Because of this community, we have been able to track down the perfect cast for our film and my heart is full. Now I only have one major role left to cast -

Delia - Female, Age 35 - 50 - Kids foster Mom. Appears primarily at the beginning and end of the film. In the finale, she is dressed completely in white, representing the "safe place" Kid eventually chooses over her father. Currently scheduled for August 5th and 7th.

If interested, please send an email to rowanharper386@gmail.com and be sure to attach a headshot and a reel if you have it. Note, we are currently working with deferred pay and I’d be happy to discuss that with you.

Additionally, we are looking for 1-3 child extras (Ages 8-12) for our first shoot day, this Wednesday - July 15th. If you have a child who would be interested, or know someone who does, please send me an email and I’d be happy to answer any questions.

Hope to chat soon,
Rowan

topComments.text: Is 15 too old for a child extra?

sharedPost.text:
We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel :info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
SINGING LESSONS  -
VOICE PROJECTIONS LESSONS

I’m a professional vocal coach based in Cambridge, with a conservatoire background and many years of experience as a trained opera singer. I’ve had the opportunity to work with international performers and bring that same level of coaching to my students locally and online.

I offer private singing lessons for both children and adults, either face to face or online.

For children and teens, lessons focus on:

• Building confidence and enjoying singing

• Improving vocal range and control

• Learning proper breathing and projection

• Preparing for auditions or ABRSM exams

For adults, I also offer voice coaching for:

• Singing development

• Public speaking and presentations

• Improving clarity and projection

I work with all levels, from complete beginners to more experienced singers, and tailor each lesson to the individual.

If you’d like to see examples of my work, there are videos and more information on my website below.

Happy to answer any questions or have a quick chat to see if it’s a good fit.

📍 Cambridge (also online available)

📞 07854 924209

📧 sebarotti@yahoo.com.ar

🌐 sebastianembrel.co.uk

items.title: SINGING LESSONS  -

items.text:
**Casting Call for a Permanent Main Role Role:**

Evangaline the Black Mage--Main Character Role-long term, Permanently Position.

Pay Rate:

I can offer £15 per hour starting from the first hour when we start filming and ending on the last hour when we have stop filming. Overtime payment is included.

Acting Description:

You'll be following my instructions during each Scene/Take as we film. Showing Body Language, Facial Expressions, and Fighting in a RPG gameplay style. You must have a good memory when saying your lines.

Filming Location(s): 

All over the City of Milton Keynes.

Sometimes outside of Milton Keynes if I can not find a good filming location within the area. And most times film locations need to be specific in the right film set.

How many days of Filming:

Minimal of 1 day per month. I try and do multiple days per month but it get's hard to arrange and organize a Film Date based around everyone's rota's.

Travel Payment:

Your Travel fee(s) will be covered by me coming and going from Milton Keynes but you will have to show some proof of your journey so I can give the right amount to cover your Travels.

Food and Drinks:

Food and Drinks will be provided by me, but I don't bring food and drinks since the Team has been ok bringing there own. If we are near a Local Shop, Café, Coffee Shop, or even a Fast Food Restaurant, ect. Just let me know what you like and I will pay for you.

Evangaline Character Description: 

Full Name: Evangaline Springbell

Age: 19

Class: Black Mage-(Elemental Spellcaster)

Weapon(s): Fans and Rods-(Maybe)

Character Appearance:

She wears a big Leather Brown Wizard Hat with a big Red Ribbon to the side of the Belt Buckle, a Neck Choker, and a smooth Summer Red and Black Tartan Dress with a thin small Black Jacket.

She has Black Leggings with Red and Black Socks on and her hair colour changes sometimes to match her emotions.

Her alternative clothes is a Red and Black Hell Bunny Dress. (DLC idea I have used in the past.)

Character Bio:

Evangaline is a skilful Black Mage who uses Black Magic Spells that are a variety of Elemental and Destructive Power.

She is strong-willed, courageous, and has a strong sense of determination to punish those who commit evil deeds on others with her Black Magic. Even if they are her allies and friends which makes her quite scary.

At times she losses' her cool and get's angry sometimes, losing her temper and casting a Fire Magic Spell on others, especially on Zorran who annoys her and sexualised her for being a good looking woman. Making her very fierce and those who cross her will pay with there life.

she is a bit tomboyish, imposing, sharp-tongued, and extremely blunt, always blurting what she truly thinks and feels like without reservation, even if said comments come at others' expense. She makes it a personal philosophy to always be honest as it feels better.

Relationships with other Main Characters:

(Renzu)---She has a very healthy friendship and respect to Renzu the Main Hero of the Story (Protagonist) after he helped her out for being framed for a crime she did not commit without judging her. Evangaline over time starts to development feelings towards him but still treats him like any other typical Boy as they are the same age and that Evangaline has never spent so much time with a Boy before.

(Zorran)---She doesn't like him all that much for being a drunken, lazy, childish, and perverted older man. When Zorran slaps her bum she sets his hand on fire with a fire magic spell which Zorran never learns from. Evangaline has to keep her guard up around him all the time as Zorran is unpredictable.

(Drako)--She feels Drako's pain after he lost his loved one to a Troll Monster, although Drako hasn't been part of the team for that long and she doe's not know him all too well but she enjoys his fighting spirit and resolve and get's along well with him 2nd to Renzu. Evangaline doe's not get why Drako likes Zorran that much or why his calling him "Master". She thinks he is a bit naïve.

What I'm looking for:

A Female Actress who is Capable, Committed, Not in full Education, Fit for the role, Flexible with her Rota, and is able to travel to Milton Keynes. And can travel to other locations outside Milton Keynes.

Age: 18-24

Height: 5.3 foot to 5.8 foot

Skin: White

Hair Colour: Any.

Body Type: Slim Build, Chubby, Athletic

Acting Requirements: Everybody is welcome, show me what you can do and what you know based on your Acting Experience.

Nationality: White British. Other White or British Nationality are welcome within reason.

I'm willing to let 1 or 2 slide if you don't meet the requirements, the rest will come down to a finale decision as I can't make any mistakes as this role is very important to be filled. If you don't think you can do this or can't handle it then best to step down from applying.

How to apply:

You can send a message to me directly. We can talk first, exchange information and contacts maybe, I will answer some questions that you wish to know or what I have missed in this Casting Call but not too many please as it saves time and I want to save my breath in answering questions and providing more info to those who are actually serious about this Post (No time wasters please).

After a few steps I'LL arrange a time and date to meet face to face with you if you live in or near Milton Keynes or by Video Call if you live far away like London. The chat will be about 1 hour and 30 mins.

If you are traveling to meet me in person your Travel Cost will be covered coming to Milton Keynes and going back home, which I will provide a fair sum for the time you have taken to see me on your journey.

Looking to continue filming with are new Actress as Evangaline starting August.

Thank you for taking the time to read this.

items.summary:
**Casting Call for a Permanent Main Role Role:**

Evangaline the Black Mage--Main Character Role-long term, Permanently Position.

Pay Rate:

I can offer £15 per hour starting from the first hour when we start filming and ending on the last hour when we have stop filming. Overtime payment is included.

Acting Description:

You'll be following my instructions during each Scene/Take as we film. Showing Body Language, Facial Expressions, and Fighting in a RPG gameplay style. You must have a good memory when saying your lines.

Filming Location(s): 

All over the City of Milton Keynes.

Sometimes outside of Milton Keynes if I can not find a good filming location within the area. And most times film locations need to be specific in the right film set.

How many days of Filming:

Minimal of 1 day per month. I try and do multiple days per month but it get's hard to arrange and organize a Film Date based around everyone's rota's.

Travel Payment:

Your Travel fee(s) will be covered by me coming and going from Milton Keynes but you will have to show some proof of your journey so I can give the right amount to cover your Travels.

Food and Drinks:

Food and Drinks will be provided by me, but I don't bring food and drinks since the Team has been ok bringing there own. If we are near a Local Shop, Café, Coffee Shop, or even a Fast Food Restaurant, ect. Just let me know what you like and I will pay for you.

Evangaline Character Description: 

Full Name: Evangaline Springbell

Age: 19

Class: Black Mage-(Elemental Spellcaster)

Weapon(s): Fans and Rods-(Maybe)

Character Appearance:

She wears a big Leather Brown Wizard Hat with a big Red Ribbon to the side of the Belt Buckle, a Neck Choker, and a smooth Summer Red and Black Tartan Dress with a thin small Black Jacket.

She has Black Leggings with Red and Black Socks on and her hair colour changes sometimes to match her emotions.

Her alternative clothes is a Red and Black Hell Bunny Dress. (DLC idea I have used in the past.)

Character Bio:

Evangaline is a skilful Black Mage who uses Black Magic Spells that are a variety of Elemental and Destructive Power.

She is strong-willed, courageous, and has a strong sense of determination to punish those who commit evil deeds on others with her Black Magic. Even if they are her allies and friends which makes her quite scary.

At times she losses' her cool and get's angry sometimes, losing her temper and casting a Fire Magic Spell on others, especially on Zorran who annoys her and sexualised her for being a good looking woman. Making her very fierce and those who cross her will pay with there life.

she is a bit tomboyish, imposing, sharp-tongued, and extremely blunt, always blurting what she truly thinks and feels like without reservation, even if said comments come at others' expense. She makes it a personal philosophy to always be honest as it feels better.

Relationships with other Main Characters:

(Renzu)---She has a very healthy friendship and respect to Renzu the Main Hero of the Story (Protagonist) after he helped her out for being framed for a crime she did not commit without judging her. Evangaline over time starts to development feelings towards him but still treats him like any other typical Boy as they are the same age and that Evangaline has never spent so much time with a Boy before.

(Zorran)---She doesn't like him all that much for being a drunken, lazy, childish, and perverted older man. When Zorran slaps her bum she sets his hand on fire with a fire magic spell which Zorran never learns from. Evangaline has to keep her guard up around him all the time as Zorran is unpredictable.

(Drako)--She feels Drako's pain after he lost his loved one to a Troll Monster, although Drako hasn't been part of the team for that long and she doe's not know him all too well but she enjoys his fighting spirit and resolve and get's along well with him 2nd to Renzu. Evangaline doe's not get why Drako likes Zorran that much or why his calling him "Master". She thinks he is a bit naïve.

What I'm looking for:

A Female Actress who is Capable, Committed, Not in full Education, Fit for the role, Flexible with her Rota, and is able to travel to Milton Keynes. And can travel to other locations outside Milton Keynes.

Age: 18-24

Height: 5.3 foot to 5.8 foot

Skin: White

Hair Colour: Any.

Body Type: Slim Build, Chubby, Athletic

Acting Requirements: Everybody is welcome, show me what you can do and what you know based on your Acting Experience.

Nationality: White British. Other White or British Nationality are welcome within reason.

I'm willing to let 1 or 2 slide if you don't meet the requirements, the rest will come down to a finale decision as I can't make any mistakes as this role is very important to be filled. If you don't think you can do this or can't handle it then best to step down from applying.

How to apply:

You can send a message to me directly. We can talk first, exchange information and contacts maybe, I will answer some questions that you wish to know or what I have missed in this Casting Call but not too many please as it saves time and I want to save my breath in answering questions and providing more info to those who are actually serious about this Post (No time wasters please).

After a few steps I'LL arrange a time and date to meet face to face with you if you live in or near Milton Keynes or by Video Call if you live far away like London. The chat will be about 1 hour and 30 mins.

If you are traveling to meet me in person your Travel Cost will be covered coming to Milton Keynes and going back home, which I will provide a fair sum for the time you have taken to see me on your journey.

Looking to continue filming with are new Actress as Evangaline starting August.

Thank you for taking the time to read this.

sharedPost.text:
NANI has traversed the globe in the last two years - conquering hearts and leaving many in her thrall - July 18 is the last day she will be on the big screen. Surely you don’t want major FOMO, yes? 

So go see her, or see her again. She’d really like that! 

WACO INDEPENDENT FILM FESTIVAL
July 18, 2:15pm
Grand Lodge of Texas, Waco

NEW FILM MAKERS FESTIVAL
July 18, 3:00 pm
South Park Center, Los Angeles
   
@nanishortfilm @moinky @sunimartist @sunita.s.mukhi @wacoindie @nfmla

sharedPost.text:
ATTN PLAYWRIGHTS: SEEKING NEW PLAY SUBMISSIONS!

True Repertory Theatre is seeking new play submissions for our September production of Playwright's Platform, a weekend of staged readings of new plays. We are proud to produce this festival for the third consecutive year!

INFO:

CONCEPT: Script in hand, staged readings.

LOCATION: The Beal House, 222 Main St., Kingston, MA.

REHEARSALS: September 20, 21, 23

PERFORMANCES: Friday, September 25 & Saturday, September 26 at 8pm & Sunday, September 27 at 3pm

DIRECTORS/ACTORS:  If your script is chosen, a director/actors will be provided.

SUBMISSION DEADLINE: Friday, August 14th 

SUBMISSIONS: Please send your script to: Truerepertorytheatre@gmail.com    Feel free to submit 10 minute plays, one-acts, full length!

Thank you & we look forward to hearing from you!

items.text: NEXT 10 WEEK KIDS SCREEN ACTING COURSE

sharedPost.text:
NEW KIDS 10 WEEK SCREEN ACTING COURSE SEPT- NOV Studio 96

https://screenplayacting.com/product/screen-acting-course-kids-sept-nov-2026/

We are excited to announce this brand-new kids' Screen Acting Course featuring incredible industry experts. Notably, the 10th week of the course will be led by acclaimed Director Jason Wingard. Jason is a regular director for children’s programs, including CBBC’s So Awkward Academy and CBBC So Awkward Kids Camp. He also directed 34 episodes of Coronation Street, recently worked on Hollyoaks and Emmerdale, and previously directed a recurring role on CBBC’s The Dumping Ground (which he returned to directing in January 2026).

Class Times & Pricing:

  - Ages 8–11: 11:00am - 12:00pm (£75 for the course)
  - Ages 12–Teens: 12:15pm - 1:45pm (£105 for the course)

Location:
Studio 96, Unit 1A and 1B, Sundance Court, Kansas Avenue, Salford, Media City, M50 2GZ
(FREE PARKING AVAILABLE)

A little different from my previous post, here’s a short clip of me singing as requested. 

As well as acting, singing has always been a huge passion of mine, and I love performing across different styles. I’m always looking to challenge myself and continue growing as a performer, so I thought I’d share a little of my vocal work too.

I’d love to connect with anyone looking for a singer, actor, or performer for current or future projects. Thanks for watching, and any shares or feedback are always appreciated!

items.summary:
A little different from my previous post, here’s a short clip of me singing as requested. 

As well as acting, singing has always been a huge passion of mine, and I love performing across different styles. I’m always looking to challenge myself and continue growing as a performer, so I thought I’d share a little of my vocal work too.

I’d love to connect with anyone looking for a singer, actor, or performer for current or future projects. Thanks for watching, and any shares or feedback are always appreciated!
