sharedPost.text:
We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel :info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
A Conversation initiated by TheWorkbook and Center Stage Magazine about the Future of Voice....

 

Use this link to read the June/July Edition of Center Stage Magazine https://publications.castingworkbook.com/center-stage-june-2026-u32t4yfpma/full-view.html

 

 

There has never been a more important time to talk about the human voice and the person behind it.

In our current June/July edition of Center Stage by TheWorkbook, we sat down with Tim Friedlander, Tanya Buchanan, Simon Kennedy, and Memo Sauceda, the Presidents of the Voice Actor Associations in the United States, Canada, Australia, and LATAM, respectively, along with many others. The conversations kept landing in the same place: audiences want connection, clients want authenticity, and the performers who understand that the voice is the vehicle, not the destination, are the ones building careers that last.

This edition isn’t a panic piece about AI. It’s the opposite. It’s a front-row seat to an industry that is getting clearer about what it values.

Watch the trailer below as Host Trevar Fox introduces his interview with Tim, Tanya, Simon, and Memo and click the link in the comments to read the full edition.

 

https://youtu.be/nFvuG6vXk5U?si=n2QsDtcdp3UPmGUJ

sharedPost.text:
🌀🎬🎥🌚 Exclusive Acting Workshop – Final Version .version A.

💡 Value Highlight: Learn directly from a DP/Director whose professional rate is $1,500/day 

this 4-session online workshop gives you real film-level expertise at a fraction of that cost!
Price on enquiry.

VERY LOW COST: One-on-One Online via Skype
"This course integrates the poetic realism of Tarkovsky, the practical wisdom of Michael Caine, and the transformative techniques of Stanislavski and Method Acting. Designed to deepen your craft, it focuses on authentic emotional connection and powerful storytelling."

🎬 Created by a British Cinematographer/Director with 31 Years of Experience and 32 Features to His Name
🌐 International Experience: Having worked on films worldwide, collaborating with actors and directors, I bring real-world insights from both sides of the camera. This course is designed to give actors a deep understanding of their craft, emphasizing emotional depth and character development.

🌐 IMDb: www.imdb.com/name/nm1806508

🌐 Showreel: https://enkiproductions1.8b.io

🤔 What You Will Learn:

🌀 Emotional Range: Master the ability to express a full spectrum of emotions, making your performances more believable and compelling.

🌀 Character Development: Create rich, multidimensional characters by exploring their internal world, external actions, and backstory.

🌀 Method Acting: Use personal experiences and emotions to deliver raw, authentic performances.

🌀 Working with Directors and Crew: Learn how to hit marks, understand shooting ratios, and collaborate with crew members to enhance your performance.

🌀 Scene Preparation: Techniques for script interpretation, emotional connection, and performing under pressure.

🌀 Industry Standards: How to create a professional showreel and work effectively with casting directors and filmmakers.
🎬 Day 1: Moment-to-Moment Acting (Stanislavski’s Approach).

🔹 Breaking a Scene Down: The use of internal visualization and meditation to "become" the character.

Character Exercise: The Hitman’s First Kill
📍 Scene: A low-rent hotel room in Manhattan, lit by a dull winter’s midday light. The sad hum of a ceiling fan, distant sirens, muted traffic below. On the bed—a brand-new sniper rifle.

🔹 Exercise 1 (Singular Emotion): Enter the room, pick up the gun, examine it, and prepare for the target. Remain fully in character.

🔹 Exercise 2 (Multiple Emotional Shifts):
Enter slightly out of breath, feeling relief—"I made it here. No one saw me."
The weight of reality sets in—"Am I really about to kill someone?"
Mesmerized by the artistry of the gun—draw on memories of seeing/touching weapons.
Snapped back to reality by a siren—trace the feeling of waking from a dream.
Decision made—move to the window, set up the gun, and wait.

🔹 Discussion: How do actors like Heath Ledger, Daniel Day-Lewis, and Dustin Hoffman make their characters so real? Insights from my own experiences on set with actors who never broke character—even during dinner.

Exercise 3 (If Time Allows): The Phone Call
📍 Scene: You’ve done something terrible—enough to make the person you love most leave forever. You must convince them to stay.

🎭 Goal: Improvise, using pure emotional truth, until the performance is undeniably real.

🎬 Day 2: Making Your Character Believable
🔹 Understanding the Psyche: Whether playing a killer or an ordinary person, you must know your character’s mind.

Character Exercise: The Breaking Point
📍 Scene: A crowded supermarket. A tired voice announces deals over the PA. You feel unseen, unheard, frustrated—until suddenly, you’re holding an AK-47. (Note: These scenes are purely acting exercises. They can be altered if a student is uncomfortable.)

🔹 Alternative Scene: A character about to detonate a bomb, written in the style of Heath Ledger’s Joker.

🔹 Alternative Scene: A video call to the person you love most—telling them why. (Scripted or improv.)

📍 Final Monologue Exercise: "Hi everyone… Tomorrow’s going to be different." The last words before an irreversible decision

🔹 Accents: Versatility in performance—working with British, American (Deep South), and Northern Irish accents.

🔹 Final Exercise: The Power of Stillness—sit before the camera, smiling, at total peace. Convey pure serenity.

🎬 Day 3: Working with a Director and Crew
🔹 Understanding Your Role: How an actor fits into the filmmaking process.

🔹 Hitting Marks & Lighting: The technical side of making performances shine.

🔹 Shooting Ratios: How they affect your performance.

🔹 Crew Collaboration: Understanding continuity, sound, makeup, cinematography, and direction.
Final Showreel Scenes (Day 3):

🎭 Sinister: "So you really think you got away with it? You really think that?" (Improv)

🎭 Heartbroken: "But I didn’t mean it... please, please, don’t leave me…" (Improv)

🎭 Insane (Joker-like): "Mmm... if E = mc², then time versus chaos... who cares?" (Improv)

🎭 Flat & Emotionless: "We’re born, we live, we die. That’s it." (Improv)
🔹 Goal: Draw from personal experiences and trace memories to make the performances deeply real.

🎬 Day 4: Fear and Survival – Personal Experience & Character Creation

🔹 Deep Dive: Exploring fear, survival, and desperation in character work.

Exercise 1: The Jungle Escape
📍 Scene: You’re lost in the jungle at night, exhausted, your breath the only sound. Every step is agony, but stopping means death. You call out—pleading for help. No answer.

🎭 Emotions to Explore:
Fear of death – the realization that no one is coming.
Desperation – the raw instinct to survive.
Physical exhaustion – feeling your body give in.

🎭 Method Process:
Internal Visualization – Close your eyes, hear the insects, the rustling leaves, your pounding heartbeat.

Personal Connection – Recall a moment when you felt completely lost or afraid.
Scene Execution – Let the emotions guide your body and voice.

Exercise 2: The Phone Call Redux
📍 Scene: You’re on the phone with a loved one. You need their help. If they refuse, it’s over. What do you say? What do you leave out?

🎭 Objective: Make the desperation feel real. This is life or death.

Final Performance (Day 4):
Students will perform a final emotional scene, bringing together everything they’ve learned. These performances will be recorded as raw material for their showreel.

🎬🎥 Ready to Elevate Your Acting?
This isn’t just a class—it’s an intense, immersive experience that will change the way you act forever.

🌐 To Enroll: p.m.me or e.mail:
mikeenkiproductions1@gmail.com
Let’s create something unforgettable.

items.text:
🎭✨ **OPEN CASTING CALL – A PLACE NOT MINE** ✨🎭

Have you ever wanted to be part of a musical? **This could be your sign!**

We're looking for passionate performers to join the cast of **A Place Not Mine**. Take a look at our available characters and see who speaks to you! 👀✨

❄️ **RIVEN | Male | 18+**
Quiet, intelligent and emotionally guarded. He speaks little but feels everything. Throughout his journey, he learns to trust, open up and let people in.
*Think: Riven (Winx Club) × Connor Murphy (Dear Evan Hansen)*

👑 **SERAPHINE | Female | 18+**
Charismatic, ambitious and admired by many. She seems perfect, but underneath is someone terrified of failing. She leads with heart, even when she hides it.
*Think: Glinda (Wicked) × Sharpay Evans (High School Musical)*

🌼 **AURORA | Female | 18+**
Warm, kind and compassionate. She's the peacemaker of the group and finds strength in her kindness rather than her words.
*Think: Mitchie Torres (Camp Rock)*

⚡ **SELENE | Female | 18+**
Funny, chaotic and always talking. She's the person who says what everyone else is thinking and is fiercely loyal to her friends.
*Think: Alex Russo (Wizards of Waverly Place)*

🎭 **ROWAN | Male | 18+**
Dramatic, loud and never short on words. The comic relief of the group who loves theatre, attention and life itself.
*Think: Ryan Evans (High School Musical)*

💎 **ELARA | Female | 18+**
Calm, intelligent and sarcastic. She sees through people before they even realise it and will always protect her friends—in her own way.
*Think: Jade West (Victorious)*

☀️ **ORIS | Male | 18+**
Funny, curious and endlessly optimistic—the heart of the group. Behind all the jokes is someone who genuinely and deeply cares.
*Think: Olaf (Frozen) × Donkey (Shrek)*

📚 **PROFESSOR SYLAS | Male | Playing Age 30–40**
Intelligent, disciplined and highly respected. He believes strongly in order, responsibility and tradition, but as the story unfolds, he begins to question whether following the rules is always the right thing to do.
*Think: Severus Snape (Harry Potter)*

👑 **HEADMISTRESS VESPERA | Female | Playing Age 30–40**
Calm, elegant and composed. She carries the weight of leading Novaterra and always appears to have everything under control, but she's forced to make difficult decisions to protect the institution she loves.
*Think: Professor McGonagall (Harry Potter) × Madame Morrible (Wicked)*

✨ **Which character sounds like you?**

📅 **Auditions: 19 July 2026**
📍 **Middlesex University, London**
💻 Online auditions can also be arranged if you can't attend in person.

This is currently an **unpaid independent production**.

📩 **DM @a.place.not.mine** with the character you'd like to audition for, and we'll send you a scene and song to prepare.

**Maybe your place is here. 💙✨**

🎭✨ **OPEN CASTING CALL – A PLACE NOT MINE** ✨🎭

Have you ever wanted to be part of a musical? **This could be your sign!**

We're looking for passionate performers to join the cast of **A Place Not Mine**. Take a look at our available characters and see who speaks to you! 👀✨

❄️ **RIVEN | Male | 18+**
Quiet, intelligent and emotionally guarded. He speaks little but feels everything. Throughout his journey, he learns to trust, open up and let people in.
*Think: Riven (Winx Club) × Connor Murphy (Dear Evan Hansen)*

👑 **SERAPHINE | Female | 18+**
Charismatic, ambitious and admired by many. She seems perfect, but underneath is someone terrified of failing. She leads with heart, even when she hides it.
*Think: Glinda (Wicked) × Sharpay Evans (High School Musical)*

🌼 **AURORA | Female | 18+**
Warm, kind and compassionate. She's the peacemaker of the group and finds strength in her kindness rather than her words.
*Think: Mitchie Torres (Camp Rock)*

⚡ **SELENE | Female | 18+**
Funny, chaotic and always talking. She's the person who says what everyone else is thinking and is fiercely loyal to her friends.
*Think: Alex Russo (Wizards of Waverly Place)*

🎭 **ROWAN | Male | 18+**
Dramatic, loud and never short on words. The comic relief of the group who loves theatre, attention and life itself.
*Think: Ryan Evans (High School Musical)*

💎 **ELARA | Female | 18+**
Calm, intelligent and sarcastic. She sees through people before they even realise it and will always protect her friends—in her own way.
*Think: Jade West (Victorious)*

☀️ **ORIS | Male | 18+**
Funny, curious and endlessly optimistic—the heart of the group. Behind all the jokes is someone who genuinely and deeply cares.
*Think: Olaf (Frozen) × Donkey (Shrek)*

📚 **PROFESSOR SYLAS | Male | Playing Age 30–40**
Intelligent, disciplined and highly respected. He believes strongly in order, responsibility and tradition, but as the story unfolds, he begins to question whether following the rules is always the right thing to do.
*Think: Severus Snape (Harry Potter)*

👑 **HEADMISTRESS VESPERA | Female | Playing Age 30–40**
Calm, elegant and composed. She carries the weight of leading Novaterra and always appears to have everything under control, but she's forced to make difficult decisions to protect the institution she loves.
*Think: Professor McGonagall (Harry Potter) × Madame Morrible (Wicked)*

✨ **Which character sounds like you?**

📅 **Auditions: 19 July 2026**
📍 **Middlesex University, London**
💻 Online auditions can also be arranged if you can't attend in person.

This is currently an **unpaid independent production**.

📩 **DM @a.place.not.mine** with the character you'd like to audition for, and we'll send you a scene and song to prepare.

**Maybe your place is here. 💙✨**
items.title: 🎭✨ **OPEN CASTING CALL – A PLACE NOT MINE** ✨🎭

items.text: Monday - 6.30pm - First class JUST £3!!

sharedPost.text:
Working on something more lyrical in this Summer heat!! 🥵🔥 Still getting a good workout in though……whilst exploring and developing our artistry! 🙌 Because this is a DANCE class, for beginners. COMPLETE beginners. We work to levels that assist and stretch everybody and develop them as dancers, not just an aerobic workout to music. If you’re interested, come and give it a go! The style changes every few weeks. (Take a look at our other videos.) 

#danceclass #fitnessjourney #beginnersclass #newhobby #meetnewpeople

items.text:
CASTING CALL - Horror/Dark Comedy Short Film

An obsessive Canucks fan must break a curse which he believes connects his life to the Vancouver Canucks in all the wrong ways.

A film about what it’s like to be a Vancouver Canucks fan. 

Email your headshots, resume, and demo reel (if applicable) to canuck.movie@gmail.com and indicate which role you’d like to be considered for. If you’re a good match, we’ll send the sides over right away.

Read below for more information.

topComments.text: Would age 18 be ok instead of 19?

Craft service, IMDB credit, and demo reel footage provided. items.text:
CASTING CALL – PERFORMERS & PERSONALITIES
Music Video: "STRUT" by BEACHTITZ

Location: City Centre Motor Hotel – Vancouver, BC�Shoot Date: Monday, July 20�Time: Approximately 10:00 PM – 12:00 AM�Compensation: Unpaid (Professional Footage + Credit)

We're transforming a retro Vancouver motel into a bold, neon-soaked underground spectacle for the final scene of "STRUT."

This isn't a traditional party scene—it's a celebration of individuality, confidence, and people who own every room they walk into. Think rebellious glamour, underground nightlife, and unforgettable personalities.

We're casting:

* Drag queens

* Fire performers*

* Circus performers

* Stilt walkers

* Flow artists (LED, poi, hoops, fans, etc.)

* Burlesque performers

* Dancers (all styles)

* Roller skaters

* Alternative models

* Tattoo artists, musicians, and creatives with standout style

* Fashion-forward personalities

* Anyone with an unforgettable look and commanding presence

No acting experience is necessary. We're looking for people who are expressive, comfortable on camera, and excited to help create a visually iconic scene.

Wardrobe Inspiration

Think bold, glamorous, expressive, rebellious, high fashion, leather, sequins, latex, vintage, punk, queer nightlife, festival couture, or anything that makes you feel unstoppable. This is your chance to show up as your most confident self.

What You'll Receive

* Professional footage for your reel or social media

* Credit in the official music video

* The opportunity to collaborate with an incredible community of local artists

To Apply

Please send:

* 2–3 recent photos

* Your Instagram

* A brief description of what you do

* Performance photos or videos (if applicable)

DM myself or @BEACHTITZ

Or email breaschneidertalent@gmail.com with the subject line:

"STRUT – MOTEL TAKEOVER"

Let's build a scene that feels like Vancouver's wildest underground night never ended.

*Fire performers must be experienced professionals with their own safety equipment. Any fire performance will be subject to location approval, safety protocols, and production requirements.

topComments.text: For many of us, performing isn't a hobby, it's our profession. While footage can certainly be appreciated, asking professionals to work solely for content contributes to the idea that creative labour has no monetary value. Fair compensation helps sustain the artists who make these events memorable. In addition fire, aerialists, and professional performers require insurance to perform and that insurance is at a high cost.

items.text:
Poszukuje aktora!!!

Poszukuję mężczyzny do nagrania krótkich filmów na social media dla kancelarii prawnej specjalizującej się w świadczeniach dla osób z niepełnosprawnościami. Materiały będą wykorzystywane w publikacjach organicznych oraz płatnych kampaniach.

Kogo szukamy:
Profil: Mężczyzna w wieku 35-50 lat.
Lokalizacja: Nagrania odbędą się w Toruniu. Najlepiej osoby z okolic lub z możliwością bezproblemowego dojazdu na miejsce.

Termin:
Dzień zdjęciowy zaplanowany jest na lipiec. Zgłaszając się, koniecznie podaj swoją dostępność na ten miesiąc.

Jak się zgłosić?
Zostaw komentarz pod tym postem lub wyślij zgłoszenie na adres e-mail:
biuro@kompotstudio.com

W zgłoszeniu proszę o przesłanie portfolio, informacji o wolnych terminach w lipcu oraz oczekiwaną stawkę.

‼️🎬🎞️📽️ CASTING STACJONARNY ‼️ WARSZAWA
Mamy dla Was nową wspaniałą produkcję filmową, kostiumową. 

🗓️ DATA 17.07 

🕒 Jesteśmy w godzinach od 11:00-19:00

📍Warszawa, WFDiF

CHEŁMSKA 21 bud 1 pokój 5 

Odświeżysz zdjęcia, zapiszesz się do cyfrowej bazy. Otworzysz drzwi na naszą współpracę.

Zapraszamy wszystkich zainteresowanych!

POMORZE | NON PROFIT | WRZESIEŃ

Cześć, 

Do krótkometrażowego filmu (30min) pt. „Postój” szukamy aktorek do postaci epizodycznych. Zdjęcia zaplanowane są na wrzesień, na Kaszubach. 
Doświadczenie jest wymagane. Informacje o projekcie zostały umieszczone na planszach.

Chętne aktorki prosimy o przesłanie maila z informacjami o sobie i zdjęciami (oraz materiałami wideo) na adres caramelfilmprod@gmail.com. Prosimy nadać tytuł wiadomości "imię i nazwisko - CASTING *IMIĘ POSTACI*". Na zgłoszenia czekamy do końca lipca 2026 roku. W razie jakichkolwiek pytań zapraszam do kontaktu w wiadomości prywatnej.

items.text:
❗️POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI - WARSZAWA ❗️
Do realizacji etiudy operatorskiej IV roku Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukujemy statystów.🎬

Terminy zdjęć: 

🗓️21 lipca - Warszawa

▪️6 osób (ok. 20-25 lat)

🎭członkowie grupy teatralnej, do której należą główni bohaterowie filmu 

🗓️24 lipca - Warszawa 

▪️10 osób (wiek dowolny)

Ⓜ️pasażerowie komunikacji miejskiej (tramwaj, peron metra)

Jeśli ktoś byłby zainteresowany i dostępny w obu terminach prosimy o informację!

▪️Ze względu na dość skromny budżet jest to oferta non-profit. Oferujemy natomiast pożywienie oraz napoje na planie, doborowe towarzystwo oraz niezapomniane doświadczenie filmowe! 

▪️Jeśli jesteście w trakcie budowania swojego CV artystycznego jest to idealny projekt dla Was!

Wszystkie osoby zainteresowane proszę o kontakt za pośrednictwem fb bądź o wiadomość e-mail na adres: zuzannna.kubanska@gmail.com oraz o załączenie fotografii przedstawiającej aktualny wygląd 📩

Widzimy się na planie!😁👋

SERIAL KOSTIUMOWY- Projekt Pauli 

•Przenieśmy się w czasie, gramy XIX wiek ! 
•Ścisła kontynuacja 11,12,13 (720 zl netto całość) zdjęcia nocne 
Dodatkowo wcześniej płatne przymiarki 5-7 sierpnia.(60 zł) 

Miejsce Warszawa 

Przymiarki: 
5,6,7 sierpnia 
godziny 10-19 
Marynarska 14

Panie bez sztucznych rzęs, paznokci, jenolity kolor włosó, Panowie bez wygolonych fryzur.

📩Zgłoszenia w tytule : WESELE 
juliapowala.sceneria@gmail.com

TYLKO ZDJĘCIA Z TERAZ , gdzie dobrze widać twarz i fryzure. Imie, nazwisko, numer tel. 
Panowie zapuszczajcie włosy!

items.title: ARE YOU READY??

items.text:
Hello everyone!

My name is Giovanni, and I'm a fashion & portrait photographer from the Netherlands. I'll be visiting **Berlin from July 20th to July 22nd**, and I'm looking to collaborate with a **male model (18+), tall, athletic/muscular build**, for an intimate, editorial-style direct flash photoshoot.

My photography is inspired by 90s fashion campaigns, with a candid, classy, and cinematic aesthetic. This is **not** an explicit shoot, but it is sensual and fashion-oriented.

If you're interested or know someone who might be a great fit, feel free to send me a message!

📍 Berlin, Germany
📅 July 20 to July 22
📸 Instagram: **@giotimoteo**

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE: FEATURED SUPPORTING ARTISTES
PROJECT DETAILS

Project Title: TROM (working title) 

Casting Director: Kwaku Ankomah

Project Type: Feature Film

Casting Location: London, UK

Production Dates: Friday 7th – Sunday 9th August 2026 (Specific call dates TBC based on role)

Location: London (including luxury penthouse, high-end corporate office, & yacht locations)

Remuneration: Standard Featured SA Rate £200 per day (On-set catering provided). 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

FEATURED BACKGROUND BREAKDOWNS

We are casting highly specific, Featured Supporting Artistes to build the premium, high-stakes London ecosystem for our lead character. you will be crucial to the world-building, credibility, and visual style of the film's opening sequences.

ROLE 1: LUXURY YACHT GUESTS (3 Males / 3 Females)

Playing Age: Males 28–33 | Females 24–28

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Very attractive, polished, premium grooming, and naturally elegant.

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

These guests are part of an aspirational, exclusive London social circle. They represent young finance, media, and luxury-circuit professionals. They are beautiful but believable, polished without looking "try-hard," and completely comfortable around wealth, champagne, and high status. The mood of the scene is celebratory, sexy, and exclusive. 

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires excellent personal grooming and a premium, high-end wardrobe sense.

- Must exhibit natural, grounded social confidence on camera (no awkward or forced "party energy").

- You must move and interact like people who naturally belong on a private yacht.

ROLE 2: ELITE BROKERAGE FLOOR STAFF (4 Males / 2 Females)

Playing Age: Males 33–42 | Females 28–33

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Sharp, tailored, high-end corporate authenticity.

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

These artistes must make a top-tier brokerage floor feel active, highly intelligent, and expensive. You are part of the world-building that proves the lead character operates at a serious, high-stakes level. You should read as real finance professionals: switched on, fast-paced, meticulously groomed, and completely credible dealing with screens, phones, pressure, and numbers. 

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires absolute corporate authenticity

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS

Please email applications directly to: trommovie@gmail.com

All submissions must include:

1. Current, clear photos (headshot and a full-length photo

2. A brief note confirming your availability between 7th–9th August 2026.

Selected applicants will be contacted directly with exact shoot dates and call times.

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE: PAID FEATURE FILM
PROJECT DETAILS

Project Title: TROM (working title) 

Casting Director: Kwaku Ankomah

Project Type: Feature Film (Filming in UK) 

Casting Location: Self-Tape / London, UK

Key Dates & Deadlines:

- Application Deadline: Sunday 19th July 2026 at 6:00 PM BST

- Self-Tape Audition Window: 18th – 21st July 2026

- Self-Tape Submission Deadline: Tuesday 21st July 2026 at 6:00 PM BST

- Live Chemistry Recalls (London): Saturday 25th or Sunday 26th July 2026 (TBC)

Production Dates: Friday 7th – Sunday 9th August 2026 (3 Shoot Days)

Location: London (including luxury penthouse & yacht locations)

Remuneration: £400.00 per day (Flat Fee). On-set catering and pre-approved travel expenses provided.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CHARACTER BREAKDOWNS (SPEAKING ROLES)

ROLE: KAREN

Playing Age: 24–26

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: White British

Appearance: Polished, elegant, high-status ease.

Accent: Natural, contemporary British English (RP / upper-middle-class).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

Karen is a major supporting role in the London section of the film. She is the affluent, polished, and affectionate girlfriend of the lead character, Marcus (a successful Ghanaian stockbroker). When an unexpected crisis forces Marcus to suddenly flee back to Ghana, Karen's secure world collapses.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires strong romantic chemistry and comfort with bedroom intimacy and luxury social scenes (yacht/penthouse).

- Requires excellent emotional range.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: JAMES

Playing Age: 33–36

Gender: Male

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Well-groomed, sharp, masculine corporate ease.

Accent: Contemporary British English / Corporate London. 

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

James is part colleague, part mentor, and a firm floor favourite at the brokerage. He is a senior office figure who immediately recognizes and enjoys top-tier talent. In the opening London scenes, James’s interactions with Marcus are vital to establishing just how highly valued, admired, and celebrated Marcus is within the firm before the crisis hits. He speaks to Marcus as an equal with genuine professional respect and affection.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires natural authority, warmth, and sharp wit.

- Strong onscreen chemistry with the actor playing Marcus to establish deep professional trust.

- Performance must be socially fluid, alive, and sharp—completely avoiding any stiff, bureaucratic corporate stereotypes.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: DAVID

Playing Age: 40–45

Gender: Male

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Distinguished, senior corporate presence. 

Accent: British English (Natural / Professional).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

David is one of the primary corporate faces spearheading the internal investigation. He is deeply procedural, controlled, and entirely unsentimental. He does not need to overplay suspicion; his immense power comes from his absolute stillness and the fact that he never wastes a word. He is a senior executive accustomed to handling high-stakes legal sensitivity and institutional protection. He is calm, direct, and dangerous precisely because he sounds so measured.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires immense screen command, presence, and stillness over flamboyance. 

- Must deliver sharp, clinical dialogue that instantly shifts the temperature and tension of the boardroom.

- Performance must feel senior, trusted, and completely at home in corporate crisis mode.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: HELEN

Playing Age: 35–40

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Elegant, sophisticated, impeccable boardroom grooming.

Accent: British English (RP / Corporate Eloquent).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

Helen is the most polished face in the corporate boardroom. She leads parts of the high-stakes questioning with effortless professional calm and surface civility. However, underneath that flawless veneer is hard institutional discipline. She is highly intelligent, meticulously well-briefed, and emotionally self-contained. Her function is to embody the cool machinery of a corporate system that can smile warmly while systematically dismantling someone. 

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires a powerful, commanding boardroom presence without ever raising her voice or relying on melodrama.

- Excellent balance of outward sophistication and underlying steel.

- Must be fully believable as an elite, high-level corporate operator whose calm restraint makes the interrogation deeply unsettling.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: NOAH

Playing Age: 40–46

Gender: Male

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Sharp, clinical, highly observant.

Accent: British English (Natural / Precise).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

Noah represents the hardest edge in the boardroom. Where Helen is controlled and David is procedural, Noah is the most forensic, probing, and openly suspicious investigator. He is the one who will relentlessly press when an answer does not satisfy him. He is not a theatrical antagonist; he is highly clever, clinical, and calculating. His questions function like scalpels rather than blunt force.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires a precise, highly watchful actor who excels at managing interrogation rhythm and subtext.

- Ability to make simple, direct lines sound like absolute traps.

- Must feel entirely capable of getting under the lead character's skin while maintaining perfect professional composure.

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS

Please email applications directly to: trommovie@gmail.com

All submissions must include:

1. Current professional headshots / photos

2. An up-to-date Acting CV / Resume

3. A link to your showreel (if available)

Upon receipt and review of your photos and CV, further production information and script sides will be provided to selected applicants.

Are you (or someone you know) aged 6–17 with a big personality and dreams of performing? 🎭✨

Boomerang Talent Agency is on the lookout for fresh, exciting young talent from across the UK! 🇬🇧

Whether you love acting, singing, performing, or simply have a spark that shines on camera, we’d love to hear from you!

✨ To apply, send us:
📸 A recent headshot
📍 Your location
🎂 Your age
🎥 A short video of yourself being you or performing a monologue

📧 Email: agents@boomerangactors.com
🌐 Apply online: www.boomerangactors.com

Tag a talented young star ⭐ and share this with friends, schools and drama groups who might be interested!

We can’t wait to discover the next generation of talent! 💜💛

items.text:
Für das studentische Abschlussprojekt **„Datensatz 27“** – ein atmosphärisches Sci-Fi-Kammerspiel im Found-Footage-Stil (ca. 90er/00er-Jahre-Ästhetik) – suchen wir unseren Hauptdarsteller.
* **Rolle:** DR. GABRIEL REHN (m, Spielalter ca. 28–40 Jahre).
* **Typus:** Ein analytischer, anfangs distanzierter Datenanalyst, der sich bei der Untersuchung eines städtischen Störsignals in eine manische, existenzielle Obsession hineinsteigert.
* **Anforderung:** Starke Textarbeit (Umgang mit wissenschaftlichem Vokabular, das in nackte Panik umschlägt) und nuanciertes Präsenzspiel (Mikromimik) vor einer statischen Kamera.
* **Projektart:** Studentischer Kurzfilm (Abschlussprojekt). Perfekt für das eigene Showreel auf High-End-Niveau.

Ansprechpartner: André

Rollen-/Anforderungsprofil

DR. GABRIEL REHN (männlich, Spielalter ca. 28–40 Jahre)

**Der Charakter:** Gabriel ist ein hochintelligenter, rationaler Datenanalyst. Zu Beginn des Films ist er der kühle, distanzierte Wissenschaftler im Dienst eines Großkonzerns – absolut kontrolliert und pragmatisch. Im Laufe der zwei Tage (erzählt über die 6 Logs) bricht sein wissenschaftliches Weltbild jedoch komplett zusammen. Er steigert sich in eine manische, existentielle Obsession hinein, als er begreift, dass der freie Wille eine mathematische Illusion ist. Er wird von der eigenen Matrix, die er untersucht, psychisch komplett gleichgeschaltet.

**Deine schauspielerische Herausforderung (Die Degeneration):** Da der Film als statisches Kammerspiel inszeniert wird, liegt die gesamte Dynamik auf deiner darstellerischen Präsenz. Gefragt ist ein extrem nuanciertes, starkes **„Show, don't tell“-Schauspiel**. Die emotionale Abwärtsspirale und der paranoide Kontrollverlust müssen primär über deine Mikromimik, deine Körperhaltung und eine brüchiger und panischer werdende Stimme spürbar werden.
* 
* **Die Anforderungen im Detail:**
   * **Exzellente Textarbeit:** Du musst komplexe, mathematisch-wissenschaftliche Fachbegriffe (*Shannon-Entropie, stochastische Prozesse, Autokorrelation*) absolut flüssig, organisch und glaubwürdig vortragen können – wie ein Profi, für den das alltägliche Routine ist.
   * **Starke Präsenz:** Die Fähigkeit, den psychologischen Verfall einer Figur über feine Nuancen spürbar zu machen, während man fast ausschließlich direkt vor einer statischen Kamera agiert.

Ansprechpartner: André

Rollen-/Anforderungsprofil

DR. GABRIEL REHN (männlich, Spielalter ca. 28–40 Jahre)

**Der Charakter:** Gabriel ist ein hochintelligenter, rationaler Datenanalyst. Zu Beginn des Films ist er der kühle, distanzierte Wissenschaftler im Dienst eines Großkonzerns – absolut kontrolliert und pragmatisch. Im Laufe der zwei Tage (erzählt über die 6 Logs) bricht sein wissenschaftliches Weltbild jedoch komplett zusammen. Er steigert sich in eine manische, existentielle Obsession hinein, als er begreift, dass der freie Wille eine mathematische Illusion ist. Er wird von der eigenen Matrix, die er untersucht, psychisch komplett gleichgeschaltet.

**Deine schauspielerische Herausforderung (Die Degeneration):** Da der Film als statisches Kammerspiel inszeniert wird, liegt die gesamte Dynamik auf deiner darstellerischen Präsenz. Gefragt ist ein extrem nuanciertes, starkes **„Show, don't tell“-Schauspiel**. Die emotionale Abwärtsspirale und der paranoide Kontrollverlust müssen primär über deine Mikromimik, deine Körperhaltung und eine brüchiger und panischer werdende Stimme spürbar werden.
* 
* **Die Anforderungen im Detail:**
   * **Exzellente Textarbeit:** Du musst komplexe, mathematisch-wissenschaftliche Fachbegriffe (*Shannon-Entropie, stochastische Prozesse, Autokorrelation*) absolut flüssig, organisch und glaubwürdig vortragen können – wie ein Profi, für den das alltägliche Routine ist.
   * **Starke Präsenz:** Die Fähigkeit, den psychologischen Verfall einer Figur über feine Nuancen spürbar zu machen, während man fast ausschließlich direkt vor einer statischen Kamera agiert.
items.title: Für das studentische Abschlussprojekt **„Datensatz 27“** – ein atmosphärisches Sci-Fi-Kammerspiel im Found-Footage-Stil (ca. 90er/00er-Jahre-Ästhetik) – suchen wir unseren Hauptdarsteller.

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE — PAID SUPPORTING ROLE

I’m looking for an actress to play Mrs. Wallace, Tess’s mother, in my upcoming short film The Gift. It is a small but important supporting role with a brief driveway scene and natural dialogue.

Role: Mrs. Wallace
Playing age: 40–50
Race: White
Shoot date: August 5, 2026
Shoot time: 5:00 PM to 9:00 PM
Shoot location: Denver metro area
Compensation: $100

Required availability:

Online team meeting on July 20
In-person rehearsal near Castle Rock on July 22, approximately three hours in the evening
Filming on August 5 from 5:00 PM to 9:00 PM

A brief audition tape will be required.

Previous work can be found by searching Forrainfilms on YouTube.

To be considered, please email your name, a recent photo, contact information, and any acting materials or relevant experience to sunburstcinema@gmail.com with the subject line “Mrs. Wallace Casting.”

Please send all inquiries via email. No DMs, please.

Thank you!!!

items.text:
Casting Call

"A Bad Person"

LOGLINE: A small-time con artist, already having the worst day of his life, receives a visit from his ex-wife

Production Title: A Bad Person

Genre: Drama

Production Type: Indie

Compensation: Paid. 

Audition Information: Virtual/Self Tape

Shooting Schedule:

● Rehearsal  Saturday 8/8

● Shoot Sunday 8/9 & Saturday 8/15 & Sunday 8/16

Shooting Location: Commerce City, CO

Email: andrew@westofcenterfilms.com

Character Breakdowns:

CALVIN MALE (30s-40s)

A small-time scam artist, who has expanded his efforts into a large warehouse full of employees. We meet him on possibly the worst day of his life, where, after finding out his mother has died, he receives an unexpected visit from his ex-wife, whom he very much still loves. The drama takes place between these two characters, as they try to navigate a possible reunion amidst the chaos taking place all around them. Looking for someone with high endurance (will be walking the entire shoot), intensity, and on-screen magnetism. We don’t have to like him, but we do have to care about him.

SUZIE Female (40s-60s)

A well-intentioned–but somewhat hapless–assistant to a small-time con artist, Suzie has the habit of making bad situations into worse ones. Looking for someone with high endurance (will be walking the entire shoot), funny, charming, and a pure scene-stealer.

PA / EXTRA (18+)

A hybrid role consisting of helping out production, while appearing in the background of scenes, with possible dialogue. Experience isn’t the biggest factor, mainly looking for someone with a great attitude and bundles of energy who is keen to learn. The days will be active and long, but extremely fun. 

Please send your resume to andrew@westofcenterfilms.com. Let us know if your avalable on the day of rehearsal and shooting day. Let us know if your SAG and upon request, I'll email you the attached side. Self-tape by Friday, July 17th. Early submissions is awsome.

Für einen Werbespot eines großen Lebensmitteldiscounters suche ich verschiedene Menschen türkischer Herkunft

Gerne kannst du dich zusammen mit deiner Familie bewerben denn ich suche folgende Personen:

Junge (11 - 15 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft der ein talentierter Fussballspieler ist

Vater (30-45 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft

Mutter (30-45 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft

Großmutter (60-75 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft

älterer Bruder/Schwester/Cousine / Cousin (15-19 Jahre alt)

Die Fakten zum Dreh:

Wann: wir drehen zwischen dem 22.-24.7. 2026

Wo: wir drehen in Tallin (Estland)

Wir bräuchten dich/euch zwischen dem 19.7. - 25.7. (inkl. An- Abreise / Fitting /Dreh)

Reise + Unterkunftskosten werden von der Produktion übernommen.

Schauspielerische Vorerfahrungen sind keine Voraussetzung. Es wird keinen Text geben der gelernt werden muss.

Pro Person gibt es (mit Drehhonorar + Buyout) mind. 2500 € (für die Rollen der Erwachsenen 3.500 € oder mehr)

Interesse?

Melde dich fix (spätestens bis zum 7.7.) mit einem Foto von dir per Mail bei: info@dokucasting.com

# 🎬 Darsteller:innen gesucht (m/w/d) – Social Media Videos in Berlin

**Adash Agency | Berlin | Freelance / auf Projektbasis | 25 € pro Stunde**

## Du wolltest schon immer vor der Kamera stehen? Hier ist deine Ausrede.

Wir sind Adash – eine Berliner Kreativagentur, die Social-Media-Content produziert, der Leute tatsächlich zum Anhalten bringt. (Ja, das behaupten alle. Wir haben aber die Views, um es zu beweisen.)

Für unsere Video-Produktionen suchen wir Gesichter. Menschen, die vor der Kamera nicht einfrieren, sondern aufblühen. Schauspiel-Ausbildung? Brauchst du nicht. Instagram-Following? Egal. Was du brauchst, steht weiter unten – und es ist weniger, als du denkst.

## Was dich erwartet
* **Kurze, knackige Shootings:** ca. 2–3 Stunden pro Dreh. Kein 12-Stunden-Set, kein Warten im Regen.
* **Abwechslung, die süchtig macht:** Heute Streetwear-Brand, morgen Gastro, übermorgen Sanitärtechnik. Klingt random? Ist es auch – und genau deshalb wird es nie langweilig.
* **Alles ist vorbereitet:** Jeder Dreh läuft nach Plan und Skript. Du musst dir nichts ausdenken, nichts auswendig lernen wie im Theater – du bekommst klare Anweisungen und ein Team, das dich gut aussehen lässt.
* **Echtes Set-Feeling:** Professionelle Kamera, professionelle Crew, professioneller Content – und du mittendrin statt nur im Feed.
* **Content fürs eigene Portfolio:** Du sammelst Kamera-Erfahrung und Material, das du vorzeigen kannst.
## Was du mitbringen musst
* **Selbstbewusstsein.** Die Kamera merkt, ob du dich wohlfühlst. Du solltest Bock haben, gesehen zu werden.
* **Sicheres, sauberes Auftreten.** Pünktlich, zuverlässig, gepflegt – die Basics, die trotzdem nicht jeder draufhat.
* **Sonst: nichts.** Keine Vorkenntnisse, keine Schauspielschule, kein Showreel. Wir bringen dir alles bei, was du am Set wissen musst.
## Was du bekommst
* **25 € pro Stunde** – auch pauschal pro Shooting verhandelbar.
* Flexible Termine, die sich mit Studium, Job oder deinem Leben vereinbaren lassen.
* Ein Team, das Drehs ernst nimmt, sich selbst aber nicht zu ernst.
* Die Chance, regelmäßig gebucht zu werden, wenn's zwischen uns funkt.
## Wer wir sind

Adash Agency – Kreativ- und Social-Media-Agentur aus Berlin-Schöneberg. Wir produzieren Reels, Spots und Kampagnen für Marken aus Gastronomie, Handwerk, Fashion und allem dazwischen. Mit echter Crew, echten Darsteller:innen und Skripten, die auf Performance getrimmt sind.
## So bewirbst du dich

Kein Anschreiben. Kein Lebenslauf-Roman. Schick uns einfach:
1. **Ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo** (30–60 Sekunden, Handy reicht völlig): Wer bist du, warum willst du vor die Kamera?
2. **2–3 aktuelle Fotos** von dir.

📩 **[kontakt@adashcreatives.com](mailto:burc@adashcreatives.com)** 
📱 Instagram: **@Adash.Agency** 
📍 Shootings in Berlin

Wir melden uns bei allen zurück, die uns catchen. Und wenn du bis hierhin gelesen hast, ohne wegzuscrollen – gutes Zeichen. Genau diese Aufmerksamkeit wollen wir auch in unseren Videos.

topComments.text: Hat schon Text oder ohne Text? Ich möchte gerne teilnehmen.

Keine Ertahrung nötig Flexible lerm лe pizz Plan & Skript lusive DU BRAUCHST Regelmäßige Bookingsmöglich BEWIRBST DICH Selbstbewusstsein sein Selbstbe SauberesAuftreten 0ס Zuver rlässigkeit Kein TAKT ben 30-60 Sek Video 3aktuelleFot Fotos K ontakt@adashu shcreative .com Irstagram:@Adesh.Agency Instagram: @Adssh.Agency Shootingsin Bertin HEUTE IST DEIN UMZUGSTAG ADASH Wirmeldenunsbialanrnamin uns melden catchen gelesen gutesZeichen, 4,8 STERNE +3500 BEWERTUNGEN ECHTE DREHS. items.text:
Akut i morgen torsdag den 16. Juli. 
På vegne af en anden:

STATISTER SØGES TIL NY DANSK MUSIKVIDEO I KØBENHAVN (ULØNNET) 

Vi søger statister til optagelser torsdag d. 16. juli. Alle medvirkende bruges på dagen, men i forskellige tidsrum afhængigt af scenen.

Medvirken er ulønnet, men vi sørger selvfølgelig for forplejning til alle deltagere!

Vi søger:

Børn (7-12 år) 08.30-14.30 (man kan eventuelt være med fra 11:00-14:30 hvis man ikke har mulig for at deltage fra 8:30)

Vi søger en masse børn, som skal medvirke som elever i scener, der foregår på en skole

En forælder eller anden værge er meget velkommen til at være med under optagelserne. Vi har desuden en børneansvarlig, som sørger for, at alle børn har det godt og hjælper med at holde styr på gruppen. 

Alle børn skal have skriftlig tilladelse fra deres forældre eller værger, før de kan deltage.

Unge (18-25 år) med studenterhue (alle slags) Kl. 14.30-16.30

Vi søger unge med studenterhuer til en scene med festlig sommerstemning. Vi ser ikke navnene på studenterhuen, så hvis du kan anskaffe dig en hue og har lyst til at lege student i et par timer, så er du velkommen! 

"Foodtruck ejer + gæster" (Alle aldre 18+) 16.30-19.00

Vi søger 3-5 personer, som skal medvirke i en scene ved en foodtruck. Nogle skal forestille at arbejde i foodtrucken, mens andre skal være gæster i kø. 

Har du lyst til at deltage eller høre mere, så send en mail til:

brabrandcreative@gmail.com

Skriv gerne:

• Dit navn
• Din alder
• Hvilken rolle du er interesseret i (barn, student eller foodtruck)
• Et vellignende billede af dig selv
• Dit telefonnummer

Man må meget gerne melde sig til med sine venner eller familie. 

Vi glæder os til en sjov optagedag! 🎥✨

items.text:
Vi søger 2 ensemblemedlemmer til FORVOKSET (ULØNNET)
På grund af et afbud søger vi 2 personer, der har lyst til at blive en del af forestillingen FORVOKSET.

📅 Periode: Juli – 18. august (ikke alle dage – skriv for prøveplan).

📍 Prøver: Hillerød og Gilleleje.

🎭 Spillesteder: Aveny-T, Remisen og Elværket.

Vi søger dig, der: 

• Har mulighed for at deltage i prøve- og spilleperioden.

• Har lyst til at indgå i et tæt og ambitiøst ensemble. 

• Er engageret, nysgerrig og klar på en intensiv og kreativ proces.

Erfaring er ikke nødvendig – alle er velkomne!

Om forestillingen:

Forvokset handler om den fortid og de traumer, der fortsat vokser i os som voksne. Forestillingen er en fortolkning og videreudvikling af udvalgte digte fra digtsamlingen Skyggesider af Janus Hald.

(Læs mere på facebooksiden  Oh no shiit eller instagram @oh.no.shit.insta )

Kan du træde til med kort varsel – eller kender du én, der kunne være interesseret? Så skriv til os hurtigst muligt.

Vi bliver meget glade, hvis du vil dele opslaget i dit netværk😊

Skriv til os på mail: oh.no.shit.kontakt@gmail.com

topComments.text: Hej Malou Holm - måske mig? Sendt dig pb ihvertfald 💫💫💫

items.summary:
Vi søger 2 ensemblemedlemmer til FORVOKSET (ULØNNET)
På grund af et afbud søger vi 2 personer, der har lyst til at blive en del af forestillingen FORVOKSET.

📅 Periode: Juli – 18. august (ikke alle dage – skriv for prøveplan).

📍 Prøver: Hillerød og Gilleleje.

🎭 Spillesteder: Aveny-T, Remisen og Elværket.

Vi søger dig, der: 

• Har mulighed for at deltage i prøve- og spilleperioden.

• Har lyst til at indgå i et tæt og ambitiøst ensemble. 

• Er engageret, nysgerrig og klar på en intensiv og kreativ proces.

Erfaring er ikke nødvendig – alle er velkomne!

Om forestillingen:

Forvokset handler om den fortid og de traumer, der fortsat vokser i os som voksne. Forestillingen er en fortolkning og videreudvikling af udvalgte digte fra digtsamlingen Skyggesider af Janus Hald.

(Læs mere på facebooksiden  Oh no shiit eller instagram @oh.no.shit.insta )

Kan du træde til med kort varsel – eller kender du én, der kunne være interesseret? Så skriv til os hurtigst muligt.

Vi bliver meget glade, hvis du vil dele opslaget i dit netværk😊

Skriv til os på mail: oh.no.shit.kontakt@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE: PAID FEATURE FILM
PROJECT DETAILS

Project Title: TROM (working title) 

Casting Director: Kwaku Ankomah

Project Type: Feature Film (Filming in UK) 

Casting Location: Self-Tape / London, UK

Key Dates & Deadlines:

- Application Deadline: Sunday 19th July 2026 at 6:00 PM BST

- Self-Tape Audition Window: 18th – 21st July 2026

- Self-Tape Submission Deadline: Tuesday 21st July 2026 at 6:00 PM BST

- Live Chemistry Recalls (London): Saturday 25th or Sunday 26th July 2026 (TBC)

Production Dates: Friday 7th – Sunday 9th August 2026 (3 Shoot Days)

Location: London (including luxury penthouse & yacht locations)

Remuneration: £400.00 per day (Flat Fee). On-set catering and pre-approved travel expenses provided.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CHARACTER BREAKDOWNS (SPEAKING ROLES)

ROLE: KAREN

Playing Age: 24–26

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: White British

Appearance: Polished, elegant, high-status ease.

Accent: Natural, contemporary British English (RP / upper-middle-class).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

Karen is a major supporting role in the London section of the film. She is the affluent, polished, and affectionate girlfriend of the lead character, Marcus (a successful Ghanaian stockbroker). When an unexpected crisis forces Marcus to suddenly flee back to Ghana, Karen's secure world collapses.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires strong romantic chemistry and comfort with bedroom intimacy and luxury social scenes (yacht/penthouse).

- Requires excellent emotional range.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: JAMES

Playing Age: 33–36

Gender: Male

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Well-groomed, sharp, masculine corporate ease.

Accent: Contemporary British English / Corporate London. 

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

James is part colleague, part mentor, and a firm floor favourite at the brokerage. He is a senior office figure who immediately recognizes and enjoys top-tier talent. In the opening London scenes, James’s interactions with Marcus are vital to establishing just how highly valued, admired, and celebrated Marcus is within the firm before the crisis hits. He speaks to Marcus as an equal with genuine professional respect and affection.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires natural authority, warmth, and sharp wit.

- Strong onscreen chemistry with the actor playing Marcus to establish deep professional trust.

- Performance must be socially fluid, alive, and sharp—completely avoiding any stiff, bureaucratic corporate stereotypes.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: DAVID

Playing Age: 40–45

Gender: Male

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Distinguished, senior corporate presence. 

Accent: British English (Natural / Professional).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

David is one of the primary corporate faces spearheading the internal investigation. He is deeply procedural, controlled, and entirely unsentimental. He does not need to overplay suspicion; his immense power comes from his absolute stillness and the fact that he never wastes a word. He is a senior executive accustomed to handling high-stakes legal sensitivity and institutional protection. He is calm, direct, and dangerous precisely because he sounds so measured.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires immense screen command, presence, and stillness over flamboyance. 

- Must deliver sharp, clinical dialogue that instantly shifts the temperature and tension of the boardroom.

- Performance must feel senior, trusted, and completely at home in corporate crisis mode.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: HELEN

Playing Age: 35–40

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Elegant, sophisticated, impeccable boardroom grooming.

Accent: British English (RP / Corporate Eloquent).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

Helen is the most polished face in the corporate boardroom. She leads parts of the high-stakes questioning with effortless professional calm and surface civility. However, underneath that flawless veneer is hard institutional discipline. She is highly intelligent, meticulously well-briefed, and emotionally self-contained. Her function is to embody the cool machinery of a corporate system that can smile warmly while systematically dismantling someone. 

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires a powerful, commanding boardroom presence without ever raising her voice or relying on melodrama.

- Excellent balance of outward sophistication and underlying steel.

- Must be fully believable as an elite, high-level corporate operator whose calm restraint makes the interrogation deeply unsettling.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: NOAH

Playing Age: 40–46

Gender: Male

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Sharp, clinical, highly observant.

Accent: British English (Natural / Precise).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

Noah represents the hardest edge in the boardroom. Where Helen is controlled and David is procedural, Noah is the most forensic, probing, and openly suspicious investigator. He is the one who will relentlessly press when an answer does not satisfy him. He is not a theatrical antagonist; he is highly clever, clinical, and calculating. His questions function like scalpels rather than blunt force.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires a precise, highly watchful actor who excels at managing interrogation rhythm and subtext.

- Ability to make simple, direct lines sound like absolute traps.

- Must feel entirely capable of getting under the lead character's skin while maintaining perfect professional composure.

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS

Please email applications directly to: trommovie@gmail.com

All submissions must include:

1. Current professional headshots / photos

2. An up-to-date Acting CV / Resume

3. A link to your showreel (if available)

Upon receipt and review of your photos and CV, further production information and script sides will be provided to selected applicants.

items.text:
CASTING CALL — FINAL ROLES
Music Video Shoot • July 24- LA area

We’re still looking for women who embody the following looks, personalities, and talents:

* The Intellectual – academic, bookish aesthetic, glasses welcome.
* The Bombshell Blonde – platinum blonde with striking, confident, glamorous energy.
* The Queer Muse – women from the LGBTQ+ community with a strong sense of individuality and authentic self-expression.
* The Nordic Beauty – Scandinavian-inspired features and effortless, natural elegance.
* The professional hip-hop dancers  

If you or someone you know fits one of these roles, we’d love to hear from you. Please send an email submission:
Subject: Sister Army Submissiom
To: emi.emimorell@gmail.com

Thank you!

items.title: CASTING CALL — FINAL ROLES

items.text:
🎬 PAID -ACTORS AGES 18–25

Hello everyone! 
Amega Studios is seeking male and female actors for  family-comedy YouTube project.

The project is produced by the team behind H2O a comedy YouTube channel with 2 million subscribers.

We’re looking for energetic, expressive, camera-friendly people who enjoy comedy, fun activities, and challenges. Acting experience is welcome but not required.

📍 Westlake Village, CA
🎭 Non-Union
💵 First-month introductory rate: $100 per filming day

To apply, please email castyoutube@gmail.com with:

• Your name, age, and current city
• Recent photos
• Instagram, TikTok, or acting reel, if available
• A short 1–2 minute video introducing yourself

THE MAKO

sharedPost.text:
Calling all Rebels / scavengers 
We need you would you like to be in the movies we are looking for 100 supporting artists (Extras) to join us next week and become part of the N.E.S.T. Project family 

19th to the 25th July 2026 filming Mosley Manchester 

Camp with the cast be apart of the apocalypse 

Message me for details we would love to see you there  everybody welcome ❤️😎☝️

THE MAKO

Ember Production NEST Project

Like ❤️ Tag ❤️ share ❤️

Please what’s app 

Simon Hall - +44 7894 943405

No phone calls 

You will have all information

https://www.crowdfunder.co.uk/p/the-eight-saga-nest-project?utm_campaign=sharemodal&utm_medium=organicsocial&utm_source=facebook&fbclid=IwZnRzaATHRrBwZG9mA2ZkaWQWUKsRRJVhfDQFEQTQMzgoHqkJYiUNiGV4dG4DYWVtAjExAHNydGMGYXBwX2lkCjY2Mjg1NjgzNzkAAR6VeGlIHG4k2F1UU_UEvOcbW2b49dyet67DgkDZnNohavoFLxU56MDfT6jKdg_aem_p3AYZFzMgMR3kBXhPEvP3g

items.text:
Undskyld konditor, din hemmelighed : Jeg kan ikke stoppe med at bage sandwichbrød! Ingen æltning, ingen æg, intet smør! Så bløde og lækre, at mine kolleger bliver ved med at bede mig om at piske dem op! 
Dette enkle sandwichbrød er let, luftigt og perfekt til ethvert måltid. Med blot et par enkle ingredienser får du frisk, hjemmelavet brød uden besværet!
Opskrift i kommentarerne. 

FOR AT FORTSÆTTE MED MINE OPSKRIFTER, "DEL"

sharedPost.text:
💎Dance Diamonds💎  26.09. - 27.09.2026 international dance competition Germany !!!
🔥Die Registration / Anmeldung ist ab sofort bis zum 10.09.26 möglich:
https://www.art-element.de/registration-competition
🌟Der Tanzwettbewerb richtet sich an Amateur-Tänzerinnen und -Tänzer ab der Alterskategorie 10 Jahre bis zur offenen Altersklasse.
🌟Die Wettbewerbsteilnahme ist in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group,Group und Grand Group möglich.
🌟Der Wettbewerb umfasst eine Vielzahl unterschiedlicher Tanzstile. Darüber hinaus ist er für die Vorbereitung in verschiedenen Stufen für Performer oder Tanzgruppen vorgesehen.
🌟Competition program / Wettbewerbsprogramm:
💢​26.09.2026
Solo - Duo/Trio - Small Group - Group - Grand Group
Fortgeschritten/ Advanced:
💎Age to 10 - 13 Years/ Alter 10 - 13 Jahre - Young Teens;
💎Age to 13 - 17 Years/ Alter 13 - 17 Jahre - Teens
💎Age to 17 - 21 Years/ Alter 17 - 21 Jahre - Young Adults
💎Age to 21 - 27 Years/ Alter 21- 27 Jahre - Adults
Offene  Alterskategorie, 27+/ open Age category 27+
💎Mixed Alterskategorie/ Mixed Age category - only Group's
All age groups and all dance styles.
💎 - Classical Ballet / Pointe
💎 - Neo Classic/ Contemporary/ Lyrical dance
💎- Nationaltanz, Folklore, Charakter-, Hof-, Historischer Tanz
💎 - Hip Hop / Streetdance / Breakdance / Krump
💎 - Jazz-, Modern Dance/ Jazz Funk
💎 - Show Dance/Musical/ Stage Dance
💎 - Open - Mix Dance Styles​​
💢 27.09.2026

Mit dem Gutscheincode „ferienpass“
erhaltet ihr einen 10€ Nachlass und zahlt nur noch 119,00€ !!!

🔥Die Registration / Anmeldung ist ab sofort bis zum 10.09.26 möglich:
https://www.art-element.de/registration-competition

🌟Die Wettbewerbsteilnahme ist in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group,Group und Grand Group möglich.
🌟Der Wettbewerb umfasst eine Vielzahl unterschiedlicher Tanzstile. Darüber hinaus ist er für die Vorbereitung in verschiedenen Stufen für Performer oder Tanzgruppen vorgesehen.

💢​26.09.2026
Solo - Duo/Trio - Small Group - Group - Grand Group

🌟All age groups and all dance styles.​
💎 - Classical Ballet / Pointe
💎 - Neo Classic/ Contemporary/ Lyrical dance
💎 - Nationaltanz, Folklore, Charakter-, Hof-, Historischer Tanz
💎 - Hip Hop / Streetdance / Breakdance / Krump
💎 - Jazz-, Modern Dance/ Jazz Funk
💎 - Show Dance/Musical/ Stage Dance
💎 - Open - Mix Dance Styles​​
💥Registration/ Anmeldung bis 10.09. 2026 möglich / Registration is open until September 10, 2026.
🔥Das Wettbewerb präsentiert über Livestream für alle Interessenten kostenfrei und ohne extra Anmeldung über unsere Online Plattform.
💥Award -  die Bewertung läuft nach Punkten System von hochkarätige Jury.
Die Gewinner der 1 - 2 - 3 erhalten Pokale und Medaillen.
🏆 🥈🥈🥈 🥉🥉🥉 🥇🥇🥇 🏆
💎DANCE DIAMONDS KIDS💎
"Dance Diamonds Kids" 19.12. - 20.12.2026
Die Anmeldung ist vom 01.10.26 bis zum 06.12.26 möglich.
🌟Das Wettbewerb ist speziell für junge Performerinnen und Performer im Alter von 3 bis 12 Jahren organisiert. Die Teilnahme erfolgt in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group und Group.
🌟Zudem werden die Teilnehmer nach ihren Vorbereitungsstufen, sei es für Einzelperformer oder Tanzgruppen, in unterschiedliche Kategorien eingeteilt.
🌟Auf der Webseite www.art-element.de finden Sie detaillierte Informationen über unser Team, unsere Projekte- und Events - Programme sowie Archive.
Für weitere Fragen stehen wir Ihnen gerne telefonisch oder per WhatsApp: 0049-1577- 3131438 zur Verfügung.

items.text:
Du har et minut til at lave en ny hjemmelavet dessert, som jeg aldrig bliver træt af! 
Jeg har lavet denne kokosdessert i over 15 år nu. Min bedstemor lavede den længe før mig. Den er simpelthen den BEDSTE. I alle disse år har jeg ikke mødt en eneste person, der ikke har elsket den - og jeg bliver aldrig træt af den! 
Opskrift i kommentarerne. 

Jeg sendte den til dem, der takkede mig.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of egg yolk, dessert and text
